```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 3}
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45))
pcomb
ggsave(pcomb, file = here("plots", "tumor_cellularity_site_procedure.pdf"), width = 7, height = 3)
```


### InferCNV plots

```{r}
sce <- db$infercnv
sce$sample_id_new <- srt$sample_id_new[match(colnames(sce), srt$cell_id)]
sce$cell_type <- srt$cell_type[match(colnames(sce), srt$cell_id)]
sce$time_point <- srt$time_point[match(colnames(sce), srt$cell_id)]

sce <- sce[, sce$sample_id_new %in% unique(srt$sample_id_new) & sce$cell_type %in% c("Tumor Cell", "Epithelial")]

library(ComplexHeatmap)
# Sample 1000 tumor and 1000 normal cells from each patient


mat <- assay(sce) %>%
  t() %>%
  log2()

df_anno <- colData(sce) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  select(cell_type, time_point, sample_id_new) %>%
  arrange(time_point, sample_id_new, cell_type)
# rownames_to_column("cell_id") %>%
# group_by(cell_type, sample_id_new) %>%
# slice_sample(n = 100) %>%
# as.data.frame() %>%
# column_to_rownames("cell_id")

df_anno$cell_type <- factor(df_anno$cell_type)

mat <- mat[rownames(df_anno), ]

# ct_cols <- dittoColors()[1:length(unique(df_anno$cell_type))]
# names(ct_cols) <- sort(unique(df_anno$cell_type))

anno_cols <- list(
  "time_point" = colors$time_point,
  "cell_type" = colors$cell_type[unique(df_anno$cell_type)],
  "sample_id_new" = colors$sample_id_new
)

left_anno <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  df = df_anno,
  annotation_label = c("Cell Type", "Timepoint", "Sample"),
  which = "row", show_legend = c(T, T, T), col = anno_cols,
  annotation_legend_param = list(
    "sample_id_new" = list(
      ncol = 3
    )
  )
)

# Split columns by chromosome
chrs <- as.vector(gsub("chr", "", GenomeInfoDb::seqnames(SummarizedExperiment::rowRanges(sce))))
col_split <- factor(chrs, levels = unique(gtools::mixedsort(chrs)))

ht <- Heatmap(
  matrix = mat,
  name = "Log2Ratio",
  left_annotation = left_anno,
  col = logr_col_fun(breaks = c(-0.05, -0.01, 0.01, 0.05), colors = c("blue", "white", "white", "red")),
  cluster_rows = F,
  cluster_columns = F,
  show_column_dend = F,
  show_row_dend = F,
  show_row_names = F,
  show_column_names = F,
  column_split = col_split,
  row_split = df_anno$cell_type,
  raster_by_magick = F, raster_device = "CairoPNG",
  border = T,
  raster_quality = 25
)

pdf(here("plots/cohort_cnv_heatmap.pdf"), width = 13, height = 8)
draw(ht)
dev.off()
```

## Figure 3 -- Epithelial Cells


```{r}
meta_programs_df <- read.table(file = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mjz1/meta_programs_tirosh/refs/heads/main/tirosh_mp_patched.txt", header = T, sep = "\t")

meta_programs <- split(meta_programs_df, meta_programs_df$cell_type)

meta_programs <- map(meta_programs, .f = function(x) {
  res <- split(x, x$meta_program)
  map(res, .f = function(y) y$Gene)
})

names(meta_programs) <- janitor::make_clean_names(names(meta_programs))
```


### Explore

#### Unknown PDC state

Mainly in four patients

```{r}
table(srt_epi@meta.data[srt_epi$cell_type_epi == "PD9/PD27 unk.", ]$sample_id_new) %>% sort(decreasing = T)
```

```{r}
epi_marker_f <- here("results", "epi_type_degs.txt")
if (FALSE) {
  epi_degs <- FindAllMarkers(srt_epi, group.by = "cell_type_epi", min.pct = 0.05, logfc.threshold = 0.25, only.pos = T, max.cells.per.ident = 1000)
  write.table(epi_degs, file = epi_marker_f, col.names = T, row.names = F, sep = "\t")
}
epi_degs <- read.table(epi_marker_f, header = T, sep = "\t")
```



```{r, fig.width = 18, fig.height = 4}
epi_degs_top <- epi_degs %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)

p <- DotPlotter(srt_epi, features = split(epi_degs_top$gene, epi_degs_top$cluster), group.by = "cell_type_epi", rotate_y_strip = T)
p
```

```{r}
srt_epi <- scCustomize::Add_Cell_Complexity(srt_epi)


VlnPlot(srt_epi, features = "log10GenesPerUMI", group.by = "cell_type_epi", pt.size = 0, sort = T)
VlnPlot(srt_epi, features = "percent_mito", group.by = "cell_type_epi", pt.size = 0, sort = T)
VlnPlot(srt_epi, features = "percent_ribo", group.by = "cell_type_epi", pt.size = 0, sort = T)
```



### General Exploratory

```{r}
DimPlot_scCustom(srt_epi, group.by = "cell_type_epi", label = T, colors_use = colors$cell_type_epi, label.size = 3)
```





```{r, fig.width = 8, fig.height = 5}
p <- FeaturePlot_scCustom(srt_epi, features = c("SFTPB", "KRT5", "KRT17", "DSG3", "KRT6A", "SCGB3A2"), colors_use = viridis::rocket(20), order = T, raster = F, raster.dpi = c(256, 256), num_columns = 3, max.cutoff = "q99", pt.size = 0.01) &
  guides(color = guide_colorbar(keywidth = 0.5, keyheight = 3)) &
  umap_theme() &
  NoAxes() &
  # NoLegend() &
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1, plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))
p
```


```{r}
p <- VlnPlot_scCustom(srt_epi, features = c("SFTPB", "KRT5", "KRT17", "DSG3", "KRT6A", "SCGB3A2"), group.by = "cell_type_epi", pt.size = 0, plot_boxplot = T)
p
```


```{r}
x <- Plot_Density_Custom(seurat_object = srt_epi, features = c("TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_ALVEOLAR_EPITHELIAL_TYPE_1_CELL", "TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_ALVEOLAR_EPITHELIAL_TYPE_2_CELL", "TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_BASAL_CELL", "TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_NEUROENDOCRINE_CELL", "TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_PROLIFERATING_BASAL_CELL"), viridis_palette = "cividis", joint = F, combine = F)
x
```



```{r, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 8}
Plot_Density_Custom(seurat_object = srt_epi, features = c("SCGB3A1", "SCGB3A2"), joint = T, viridis_palette = "cividis")


x <- Plot_Density_Custom(seurat_object = srt_epi, features = c("KRT6A", "KRT13", "KRT14", "DSG3"), joint = T, viridis_palette = "cividis")


# AT0
# alveolar type 0 cells (n=1,440, expressing STFPB+, SCGB3A2+, SFTPChigh and SCGB3A1low) and the closely related preterminal bronchiole secretory cells (n=4,393, expressing SFTPB+, SCGB3A2+, SFTPClow and SCGB3A1high, together with alveolar type 0 cells called transitional club-AT2 cells)33,34
x <- Plot_Density_Custom(seurat_object = srt_epi, features = c("SFTPB", "SCGB3A2", "SFTPC"), joint = T, viridis_palette = "cividis")

x <- Plot_Density_Custom(seurat_object = srt_epi, features = c("SFTPB", "SCGB3A2", "SCGB3A1"), joint = T, viridis_palette = "cividis")
```


```{r, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 8}
# Hillock basal
x <- Plot_Density_Custom(seurat_object = srt_epi, features = c("KRT6A", "KRT13", "KRT14", "DSG3", "TP63"), viridis_palette = "cividis", joint = T)
x
```


```{r, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 8}
# Hillock luminal
x <- Plot_Density_Custom(seurat_object = srt_epi, features = c("KRT6A", "KRT13", "KRT14", "DSG3", "SERPINB2"), viridis_palette = "cividis", joint = T)
x
```




### UCell extra scores

```{r}
ranks <- readRDS(file = here("data", "objects", "epi_ucell_gene_ranks.rds"))

# alveolar type 0 cells (n=1,440, expressing STFPB+, SCGB3A2+, SFTPChigh and SCGB3A1low) and the closely related preterminal bronchiole secretory cells (n=4,393, expressing SFTPB+, SCGB3A2+, SFTPClow and SCGB3A1high, together with alveolar type 0 cells called transitional club-AT2 cells)33,34


hillock_gsets <- list(
  "hillock_all" = c("KRT6A", "KRT13", "KRT14", "DSG3"),
  "hillock_basal" = c("KRT6A+", "KRT13+", "KRT14+", "DSG3+", "SERPINB2-"),
  "hillock_luminal" = c("KRT6A+", "KRT13+", "KRT14+", "DSG3+", "SERPINB2+", "TP63-")
)

extra_gsets <- list(
  "AT0" = c("SFTPB+", "SCGB3A2+", "SFTPC+", "SCGB3A1-"),
  "preTBsc" = c("SFTPB+", "SCGB3A2+", "SFTPC-", "SCGB3A1+")
)

scores_hillock <- UCell::ScoreSignatures_UCell(
  precalc.ranks = ranks,
  features = hillock_gsets,
  chunk.size = 1000,
  w_neg = 1,
  BPPARAM = MulticoreParam(workers = 8, progressbar = T), name = ""
)

scores_extra <- UCell::ScoreSignatures_UCell(
  precalc.ranks = ranks,
  features = extra_gsets,
  chunk.size = 1000,
  w_neg = 0.5,
  BPPARAM = MulticoreParam(workers = 8, progressbar = T), name = ""
)

srt_epi <- AddMetaData(srt_epi, scores_hillock)
srt_epi <- AddMetaData(srt_epi, scores_extra)
```



```{r, fig.width = 12, fig.height = 4}
FeaturePlot_scCustom(srt_epi, features = c("hillock_all", "hillock_luminal", "hillock_basal"), max.cutoff = "q99", colors_use = viridis::cividis(20))

x <- Plot_Density_Custom(seurat_object = srt_epi, features = c("hillock_all", "hillock_luminal", "hillock_basal"), viridis_palette = "cividis", joint = F)
x
```

```{r, fig.width = 12, fig.height = 8}
x <- Plot_Density_Custom(seurat_object = srt_epi, features = c("NEUROD1", "NCAM1", "ASCL1"), viridis_palette = "cividis", joint = T)
x
```


```{r, fig.width = 12, fig.height = 4}
FeaturePlot_scCustom(srt_epi, features = c("AT0", "preTBsc"), max.cutoff = "q99", colors_use = viridis::cividis(20))

x <- Plot_Density_Custom(seurat_object = srt_epi, features = c("AT0", "preTBsc"), viridis_palette = "cividis", joint = F)
x
```

```{r}
VlnPlot_scCustom(srt_epi, features = c("hillock_all", "AT0"), group.by = "cell_type_epi", pt.size = 0)
```



Check cluster tree

```{r}
srt_epi$epi_clusters_0.25 <- srt_epi$epi_clusters
# p <- clustree::clustree(srt_epi@meta.data[,c("epi_clusters_0.25", "epi_clusters_0.5")], prefix = "epi_clusters_")
# p
#
table(srt_epi$epi_clusters_0.5, srt_epi$epi_clusters_0.25)
```


```{r}
prop.table(table(srt_epi$epi_clusters_0.5, srt_epi$epi_clusters_0.25), margin = 2) %>%
  ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(name = "Proportion", col = viridis::cividis(20))
```


```{r, fig.width = 13, fig.height = 6}
dp <- DotPlotter(srt_epi, features = db$markers$epi_markers_hlca, group.by = "epi_clusters_0.5", cluster_groups = T)
dp + theme(strip.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0), panel.spacing = unit(1, "mm")) +
  guides(y.sec = "axis_dendro")
```

```{r, fig.width = 16, fig.height = 6}
dp <- DotPlotter(srt_epi, features = db$markers$epi_markers_hlca, group.by = "cell_type_epi", cluster_groups = F)
dp + theme(strip.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0), panel.spacing = unit(1, "mm")) +
  guides(y.sec = guide_axis())
```


```{r, fig.height = 4.5, fig.width = 11}
dp2 <- DotPlotter(srt_epi, features = markers$epi_markers_final, group.by = "cell_type_epi", cluster_groups = F, rotate_y_strip = T)
dp2 + theme(panel.spacing = unit(1, "mm"))
```

```{r, fig.height = 5, fig.width = 9}
dp2 <- DotPlotter(srt_epi, features = markers$epi_markers_final, group.by = "epi_clusters_0.5", cluster_groups = F, rotate_y_strip = T)
dp2
```

Check final marker list iteratively

```{r, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 9}
chk_feats <- list(
  "hillock" = c("KRT6A", "KRT13", "KRT14", "SERPINB2", "TP63"),
  "chk" = c("SFTPB", "SCGB3A2", "SFTPC", "SCGB3A1"),
  "AT2-Signalling (cls7?)" = c("WNT5A", "LRP5", "CTNNBIP1", "TCF4", "CP", "GSTA1", "CYP4B1"),
  "my_luad" = c("NAPSA", "SFTPB", "SFTPC", "SFTPD"),
  "my_lusc" = c("TP63", "KRT5", "KRT6A", "KRT6B", "KRT15", "KRT16"),
  "my_sclc" = c("ASCL1", "CHGA", "NCAM1", "NEUROD1", "SYP"),
  "neuron" = c("ELAVL3", "GAD1", "PCDHA1", "SYP", "GABBR2", "CADM2"),
  "glial" = c("GFAP", "TAFA1", "AQP4", "MBP", "PLP1", "OLIG2"),
  "CSH" = c("CSH1", "CSH2")
)

cancer_genes <- c("MYC", "EGFR", "MET", "ERBB2", "KRAS", "BRAF", "CCND1", "CCND2")

hep <- c("ALB", "AFP", "HNF4A", "CYP3A4", "CYP2E1", "G6PC", "TAT", "HNF1A", "HNF1B", "TFRC", "FGB", "HP", "SERPINA1", "APOA1", "APOB")
dp2 <- DotPlotter(srt_epi, features = cancer_genes, group.by = "cell_type_epi", cluster_groups = T, rotate_y_strip = T)
dp2
# DotPlotter(srt_epi, features = chk_feats, group.by = "epi_clusters", cluster_groups = T, rotate_y_strip = T)
```

```{r}
cancer_genes <- c(c("MYC", "EGFR", "MET", "ERBB2", "KRAS", "BRAF", "CCND1", "CCND2", "MTOR", "NOTCH1", "E2F1", "ALK", "rna_TP53", "rna_RB1", "XPO1", "TEAD1", "YAP1"), markers$resistance_genes) %>% unique()

Iterate_VlnPlot_scCustom(srt_epi, features = cancer_genes, group.by = "cell_type_epi", single_pdf = T, file_path = here("plots/"), file_name = "epithelial_violins_genes", file_type = ".pdf", pt.size = 0, output_width = 10, output_height = 6)
```


```{r, fig.height = 5, fig.width = 9}
dp2 <- DotPlotter(srt_epi, features = markers$epi_markers_final, group.by = "epi_clusters2", cluster_groups = F, rotate_y_strip = T)
dp2
```


### Descriptive plots

```{r, fig.width = 13, fig.height = 4}
dp <- DotPlotter(srt_epi, features = db$markers$epi_markers_hlca, group.by = "cell_type_epi", cluster_groups = F)
dp + theme(strip.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0), panel.spacing = unit(1, "mm"))
```

How is PD9/27 classified by liftover...?

```{r}
srt_epi@meta.data %>%
  filter(cell_type_epi == "PD9/PD27 unk.") %>%
  pull(predicted.ann_finest_level) %>%
  table()


srt_epi@meta.data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = cell_type_epi, y = nCount_RNA)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90)) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log10")

dp <- DotPlotter(srt_epi, features = c("FOXI1", "KRT7", "ATP6V1B1"), group.by = "cell_type_epi", cluster_groups = F, rotate_y_strip = T)
dp
```


### Figure Plots

#### UMAP

```{r, fig.width = 6.75, fig.height = 4.25}
lab_cents <- scatools:::get_label_centers(obj = srt_epi, group_var = "cell_type_epi", reduced_dim = "umap")

df_leg <- srt_epi@meta.data %>%
  add_count(cell_type_epi, name = "epi_n") %>%
  distinct(cell_type_epi, epi_n) %>%
  mutate(label = glue("({prettyNum(epi_n, big.mark = ',')})"))

p1_leg <- df_leg %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = fct_rev(cell_type_epi), x = epi_n)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = -10000, color = cell_type_epi), size = 3.5) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = cell_type_epi), width = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(x = epi_n, label = label), size = 3, hjust = -0.1, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$cell_type_epi) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors$cell_type_epi) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  # facet_grid(fct_relevel(cell_type_l2, "Myeloid", "TNK", "B/Plasma", "Stroma", "Other") ~ ., scales = "free", space = "free", switch = "y") +
  theme(
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.background.y = element_part_rect(side = "r", fill = NA),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 1),
    plot.margin = margin(1, 4, 1, 1, unit = "lines")
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0.025, 0)) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(cap = "both")) +
  NoLegend()

p1 <- DimPlot(srt_epi, reduction = "umap", group.by = "cell_type_epi", shuffle = T, raster.dpi = c(350, 350)) +
  umap_theme() +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = lab_cents, aes(x = x, y = y, label = cell_type_epi),
    min.segment.length = 0,
    segment.size = 0.75,
    fontface = "bold",
    force = 5,
    bg.colour = "white",
    max.iter = 1e9,
    bg.r = 0.1,
    position = ggpp::position_nudge_center(center_x = 2, center_y = 2, direction = "radial", x = 0, y = 0)
  ) +
  # scale_color_manual(values = colors$site_of_tissue_simple, breaks = names(colors$site_of_tissue_simple), labels = label_num_generator(srt$site_of_tissue_simple)) +
  #   ggrepel::geom_text_repel(color = "black", data = lab_cents, aes(x = x, y = y, label = cell_type_l5), size = 3, fontface = "bold", bg.colour = "white", bg.r = .1, force = 0.1, max.iter = 1e9, min.segment.length = Inf, max.time = 1, max.overlaps = Inf) +

  scale_color_manual(values = colors$cell_type_epi, labels = label_num_generator(srt_epi$cell_type_epi), breaks = levels(srt_epi$cell_type_epi)) +
  NoAxes() +
  NoLegend() +
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1) +
  labs(title = "Epithelial Cells")

layout <- c(
  area(t = 10, b = 100, l = 1, r = 100),
  area(t = 4, l = 88, b = 59, r = 100)
)
# pcomb <- (p1 + theme(plot.margin = margin())) + free(p1_leg + theme(aspect.ratio = 1.9, plot.margin = margin())) + plot_layout(design = layout)
pcomb <- (p1 + theme(plot.margin = margin())) + p1_leg + plot_layout(design = layout)


ggsave(pcomb, file = here("plots", "epi_umap.pdf"), width = 6.75, height = 4.25)
pcomb
```


```{r}
p2 <- DimPlot(srt_epi, reduction = "umap", group.by = "cell_type_epi_coarse", shuffle = T) +
  umap_theme() +
  # scale_color_manual(values = colors$site_of_tissue_simple, breaks = names(colors$site_of_tissue_simple), labels = label_num_generator(srt$site_of_tissue_simple)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors$cell_type_epi, labels = label_num_generator(srt_epi$cell_type_epi_coarse)) +

  NoAxes() +
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1) +
  labs(title = "Epithelial Cells")
p2
```


```{r}
ps <- FeaturePlot(srt_epi, reduction = "umap", features = c(markers$epi_markers_final$AT2), order = T, combine = T, max.cutoff = "q99") & scale_color_viridis_c(option = "cividis") & guides(color = guide_colorbar(keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 3)) & NoAxes()
ps
```


```{r}
AT1 <- Plot_Density_Custom(seurat_object = srt_epi, features = c(markers$epi_markers_final$AT1), viridis_palette = "cividis", joint = T)
AT2 <- Plot_Density_Custom(seurat_object = srt_epi, features = c(markers$epi_markers_final$AT2), viridis_palette = "cividis", joint = T)
club <- Plot_Density_Custom(seurat_object = srt_epi, features = c(markers$epi_markers_final$Club), viridis_palette = "cividis", joint = T)
```


```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height = 10}
club
```



```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height = 10}
AT1
```

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height = 10}
AT2
```


#### Marker dotplots

##### Custom Genes

```{r, fig.width = 9, fig.height = 4}
# srt_epi$cell_type_epi_col <- factor(srt_epi$cell_type_epi, levels = levels(srt_epi$cell_type_epi), labels = glue("<b style='color:{colors$cell_type_epi[levels(srt_epi$cell_type_epi)]}'>{levels(srt_epi$cell_type_epi)}</b>"))
# # srt_epi$epi_type_col <- fct_rev(srt_epi$epi_type_col)
# #
#
#
#
# epi_dotplot <- DotPlotter(srt_epi[, srt_epi$cell_type_epi != "PD9/PD27 unk."], features = markers$epi_markers_final, group.by = "cell_type_epi", cluster_groups = F, rotate_y_strip = T)
# epi_dotplot +
#   theme(axis.text.y = element_markdown())
# ggsave(epi_dotplot, file = here("plots", "epi_marker_dotplot.pdf"), width = 9, height = 4)
```


```{r}
epi_dotplot <- DotPlotter(srt_epi, features = markers$epi_markers_final, group.by = "cell_type_epi", cluster_groups = F, rotate_y_strip = T)
epi_dotplot +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_markdown())
ggsave(epi_dotplot, file = here("plots", "epi_marker_dotplot_unfilt.pdf"), width = 9, height = 4)
```

Tumor cells only

```{r}
epi_dotplot <- DotPlotter(srt_epi[, srt_epi$is_tumor_cell], features = markers$epi_markers_final, group.by = "cell_type_epi", cluster_groups = F, rotate_y_strip = T)
epi_dotplot +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_markdown())
ggsave(epi_dotplot, file = here("plots", "epi_marker_dotplot_tumor_only.pdf"), width = 9, height = 4)
```


```{r}
epi_dotplot2 <- DotPlotter(srt_epi, features = c("LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC"), group.by = "cell_type_epi", cluster_groups = F, rotate_y_strip = T)
epi_dotplot2 +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_markdown())
# ggsave(epi_dotplot, file = here("plots", "epi_marker_dotplot_unfilt.pdf"), width = 9, height = 4)
```

##### HLCA marker set

```{r, fig.width = 14, fig.height = 4.5}
dp <- DotPlotter(srt_epi, features = db$markers$epi_markers_hlca, group.by = "cell_type_epi", cluster_groups = F)
dp_f <- dp + theme(strip.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0), panel.spacing = unit(1, "mm")) +
  guides(y.sec = guide_axis()) +
  labs(title = "Human Lung Cell Atlas Epithelial Marker List") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
dp_f
ggsave(dp_f, file = here("plots", "hlca_marker_dotplot.pdf"), width = 14, height = 4.5)
```


Signatures of tumor and normal cell types

```{r, fig.width = 5, fig.height = 4}
# srt_epi@meta.data %>%
#   filter(is_tumor_cell) %>%
#   dplyr::rename(
#     "AT1" = "TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_ALVEOLAR_EPITHELIAL_TYPE_1_CELL",
#     "AT2" = "TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_ALVEOLAR_EPITHELIAL_TYPE_2_CELL",
#     "NE" = "TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_NEUROENDOCRINE_CELL"
#   ) %>%
#   pivot_longer(
#     cols = c("LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC", "AT1", "AT2", "NE"),
#     names_to = "Signature", values_to = "Score"
#   ) %>%
#   group_by(Signature) %>%
#   mutate(Score_std = scale(Score)) %>%
#   group_by(Signature, cell_type_epi) %>%
#   summarize(Score_std_mean = mean(Score_std)) %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x = cell_type_epi, y = Signature)) +
#   geom_tile(aes(fill = Score_std_mean), color = "black") +
#   scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "rocket") +
#   # geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outliers = F) +
#   # facet_grid(Signature~., scales = "free") +
#   # scale_fill_manual(values = colors$cell_type_epi) +
#   # theme_few() +
#   # NoLegend() +
#   guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
#   coord_fixed()
```


#### Marker density plots

```{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4}
glist <- c("SFTPB", "SFTPC", "SCGB3A2", "KRT13", "KRT6A", "DSG3")

x <- Plot_Density_Custom(seurat_object = srt_epi, features = glist, viridis_palette = "inferno", joint = F, combine = F) # %>%


names(x) <- glist

res <- map(names(x), .f = function(gene) {
  x[[gene]]$data %>%
    mutate(!!gene := standardize(feature))
})
names(res) <- names(x)

pls <- map(names(res), .f = function(gene) {
  p <- res[[gene]] %>%
    arrange(.data[[gene]]) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2)) +
    scattermore::geom_scattermore(aes(color = .data[[gene]]), pixels = c(256, 256)) +
    # geom_point(aes(color = feature), size = 0.5) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "inferno") +
    labs(title = gene, color = "Density")
  # p <- ggrastr::rasterise(p, dpi = 300)
})

pcomb <- pls %>%
  wrap_plots(nrow = 2, guides = "collect") &
  guides(color = guide_colorbar(keywidth = 0.5, keyheight = 3)) &
  umap_theme() &
  NoAxes() &
  # NoLegend() &
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1, plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")) &
  labs(color = "Expression\nDensity")

pcomb
ggsave(pcomb, filename = here("plots", "epi_exp_dens.pdf"), width = 6, height = 4)
```


#### SFTPB Expression

```{r, fig.width = 2.5, fig.height = 3}
# p_all <- VlnPlot_scCustom(srt_epi, colors_use = colors$cell_type_epi, features = "SFTPB", group.by = "cell_type_epi", plot_boxplot = T, sort = T, add.noise = F)
# p_all
df <- FetchData(srt_epi, vars = c("cell_type_epi", "SFTPB"))
# df <- VlnPlot_scCustom(srt_epi[,grepl("^PDC|^AT2", srt_epi$cell_type_epi)], colors_use = colors$cell_type_epi, features = "SFTPB", group.by = "cell_type_epi", plot_boxplot = T, sort = T, add.noise = F)$data
p <- df %>%
  filter(grepl("^PDC|^AT2", cell_type_epi)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(cell_type_epi, -SFTPB, median), y = SFTPB)) +
  geom_violin(scale = "width", aes(fill = cell_type_epi)) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white", outliers = F) +
  # geom_pointrange(
  #   stat = "summary", fatten = 2,
  #   fun.min = function(z) {
  #     quantile(z, 0.25)
  #   },
  #   fun.max = function(z) {
  #     quantile(z, 0.75)
  #   },
  #   fun = median,
  # ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$cell_type_epi) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  NoLegend() +
  labs(x = "Celltype", y = "Expression", title = "SFTPB") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))
p
ggsave(p, file = here("plots", "sftpc_epi_expression.pdf"), width = 2.5, height = 3)
```


```{r}
p_more <- VlnPlot_scCustom(srt_epi[, grepl("^PDC|^AT2", srt_epi$cell_type_epi)], colors_use = colors$cell_type_epi, features = c("SFTPB", "SFTPC", "SCGB3A2", "SCGB3A1"), group.by = "cell_type_epi", plot_boxplot = T, sort = T, add.noise = F)
p_more
```


#### Relative cluster proportions

```{r, fig.width = 6.25, fig.height = 7.5}
p1 <- srt_epi@meta.data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = cell_type_epi)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill = sample_id_new), position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$sample_id_new) +
  labs(fill = "Patient", y = "Proportion") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(keywidth = 0.5, keyheight = 0.5, ncol = 6))

p2 <- srt_epi@meta.data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = cell_type_epi)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill = site_of_tissue_simple), position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$site_of_tissue_simple) +
  labs(fill = "Tissue site", y = "Proportion") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(keywidth = 0.5, keyheight = 0.5, ncol = 2))

p3 <- srt_epi@meta.data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = cell_type_epi)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill = time_point), position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  labs(fill = "Timepoint", y = "Proportion") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(keywidth = 0.5, keyheight = 0.5))


# p4 <- srt_epi@meta.data %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x = cell_type_epi)) +
#   geom_bar(aes(fill = fct_rev(cell_type)), position = "fill") +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = colors$cell_type) +
#   guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45))

p4 <- srt_epi@meta.data %>%
  # filter(!grepl("PD9", cell_type_epi)) %>%
  add_count(cell_type_epi, cell_type, name = "n1") %>%
  add_count(cell_type_epi, name = "n2") %>%
  mutate(prop = n1 / n2) %>%
  distinct(cell_type, cell_type_epi, prop) %>%
  filter(cell_type == "Tumor Cell") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = cell_type_epi, y = prop)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = fct_rev(cell_type)), show.legend = F) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = seq(0.25, 1, by = 0.25), alpha = 0.6, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.25)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$cell_type) +
  labs(y = "Proportion\n(tumor cells)")

p5 <- srt_epi@meta.data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = cell_type_epi)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill = Phase), position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$Phase) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  labs(fill = "Cell Cycle Phase", y = "Proportion") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(keywidth = 0.5, keyheight = 0.5))

gap_size <- 2

pcomb <- wrap_plots(
  # free(p1, type = "space", side = "r"),
  p1 + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 4, r = 2, b = gap_size, l = 2, "mm")),
  free(p3 + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = gap_size, r = 2, b = gap_size, l = 2, "mm")), type = "space", side = "r"),
  free(p2 + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = gap_size, r = 2, b = gap_size, l = 2, "mm")), type = "space", side = "r"),
  # p2,
  free(p5 + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = gap_size, r = 2, b = gap_size, l = 2, "mm")), type = "space", side = "r"),
  free(p4 + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = gap_size, r = 2, b = 2, l = 4, "mm")), type = "space", side = "l"),
  ncol = 1, axes = "collect_x"
) &
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(angle = 65, cap = "none"),
    y = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  ) &
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) &
  labs(x = "Epithelial cell state") &
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
ggsave(pcomb, file = here("plots", "epi_type_feature_proportions.pdf"), width = 6.75, height = 7.5)
pcomb
```


For main

```{r, fig.width = 3, fig.height = 2.5}
# p3 <- srt_epi@meta.data %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x = cell_type_epi)) +
#   geom_bar(aes(fill = time_point), position = "fill") +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
#   guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45))


p4 <- srt_epi@meta.data %>%
  filter(!grepl("PD9", cell_type_epi)) %>%
  add_count(cell_type_epi, cell_type, name = "n1") %>%
  add_count(cell_type_epi, name = "n2") %>%
  mutate(prop = n1 / n2) %>%
  distinct(cell_type, cell_type_epi, prop) %>%
  filter(cell_type == "Tumor Cell") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(cell_type_epi, -prop, max), y = prop)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = fct_rev(cell_type)), show.legend = F, width = 0.6) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.25), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$cell_type) +
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(angle = 45, cap = "none"),
    y = guide_axis(cap = "none")
  ) +
  labs(fill = "Cell Type", y = "Tumor cell proportion", x = NULL) +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_line(), panel.grid.minor.y = element_line())
ggsave(p4, file = here("plots", "epi_tumor_cell_bar.pdf"), width = 3, height = 2.5)
p4
```


#### Epithelial type proportions

This version is proportion of each pts tumor cells only

```{r, fig.width = 5, fig.height = 3}
# my_comparisons <- list(c("Pre", "On"), c("Pre", "PD"), c("On", "PD"))
# my_comparisons <- list(c("Pre", "PD"))


use_col <- "cell_type_epi"

df <- srt_epi@meta.data %>%
  # filter(!grepl("PD9", cell_type_epi)) %>%
  # mutate(RNA_cluster_labels = fct_rev(RNA_cluster_labels)) %>%
  filter(cell_type == "Tumor Cell") %>%
  add_count(.data[[use_col]], time_point, sample_id_new, name = "epi_type_n") %>%
  add_count(sample_id_new, name = "sample_n") %>%
  mutate(tum_prop = epi_type_n / sample_n) %>%
  distinct(.data[[use_col]], epi_type_n, sample_n, tum_prop, sample_id, time_point)


p_df <- df %>%
  group_by(.data[[use_col]]) %>%
  rstatix::wilcox_test(tum_prop ~ time_point) %>%
  rstatix::adjust_pvalue(method = "BH") %>%
  rstatix::add_significance(
    symbols = symnum_0.1_star$symbols,
    cutpoints = symnum_0.1_star$cutpoints
  ) %>%
  filter(p.adj < 0.1) %>%
  rstatix::add_xy_position()



theme(legend.position = "none", strip.background = element_blank(), strip.text.y = element_text(size = 10), strip.clip = "off", strip.placement = "outside", panel.spacing = unit(0, "mm")) +
  # ggpubr::geom_pwc(tip.length = 0, method = "t_test", label.size = 2, label = "p.adj.signif", p.adjust.method = "BH", step.increase = 0.075) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.05))) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45))

pl <- df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = time_point, y = tum_prop)) +
  # geom_boxplot(fill = NA, aes(color = time_point), outliers = F, width = 0.8, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_boxplot(outliers = F, size = 0.5, aes(fill = time_point), width = 0.9) +

  # geom_quasirandom(aes(fill = time_point), color = "grey50", dodge.width = 0.8, size = 0.75, width = 0.1, pch = 21, alpha = 0.8, stroke = 0.1) +
  geom_quasirandom(size = 0.75, alpha = 0.6, color = "black", aes(fill = time_point), stroke = 0.25, pch = 21, width = 0.3, show.legend = F) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  labs(y = "Tumor cell proportion", x = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
  facet_grid(. ~ .data[[use_col]], scales = "free", space = "free", switch = "x") +
  ggprism::add_pvalue(p_df, tip.length = 0, label = "p.adj.signif", step.increase = -0.01, bracket.nudge.y = 0, bracket.size = 0.2, label.size = 2.5) +
  # ggpubr::geom_pwc(tip.length = 0, label = "p.adj.signif", p.adjust.method = "BH", symnum.args = symnum_0.1, label.size = 2, hide.ns = T) +
  # ggpubr::stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, method = "wilcox", label = "p.signif", tip.length = 0, step.increase = 0.1, vjust = 0, size = 2.5, hide.ns = T) +
  # ggpubr::stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, method = "wilcox", label = "p.signif", tip.length = 0, step.increase = 0.1, vjust = 0, size = 2.5, hide.ns = T) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.25), expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.1))) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(hjust = 0.2),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    strip.text.x = element_markdown(angle = 90, hjust = 1, size = 8),
    strip.background.x = element_part_rect(side = "t", linewidth = 0.5),
    strip.placement = "inside",
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "mm"),
    strip.clip = "off",
    legend.position = "inside",
    legend.position.inside = c(0.8, 0.9),
    legend.title.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(fill = "Timepoint") +
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(cap = "none"),
    y = guide_axis(cap = "upper"),
    fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1, keywidth = 0.75, keyheight = 0.75)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
ggsave(pl, file = here("plots", "epi_cluster_proportions.pdf"), width = 5, height = 3)
pl
```


Binomial glm?

```{r}
```

#### Signature Heatmap

```{r, fig.width = 8, fig.height = 9}
emt_paths <- grep("emt|HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION", ignore.case = T, colnames(srt_epi@meta.data), value = T)
myc_paths <- c(grep("myc", ignore.case = T, colnames(srt_epi@meta.data), value = T))
stemness <- c("WONG_EMBRYONIC_STEM_CELL_CORE", "BENPORATH_PRC2_TARGETS")
metabolic_paths <- c("HALLMARK_GLYCOLYSIS", "HALLMARK_OXIDATIVE_PHOSPHORYLATION", "HALLMARK_MTORC1_SIGNALING")
histological_malignant <- c("LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC")
histological <- c("TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_ALVEOLAR_EPITHELIAL_TYPE_1_CELL", "TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_ALVEOLAR_EPITHELIAL_TYPE_2_CELL", "alveolar_malignant", "TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_BASAL_CELL", "TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_CILIATED_CELL", "TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_CLUB_CELL", "TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_NEUROENDOCRINE_CELL", "TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_PROLIFERATING_BASAL_CELL", "TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_PROXIMAL_BASAL_CELL")
cell_cycle <- c(grep("cycle", colnames(srt_epi@meta.data), ignore.case = T, value = T))
mapk <- c("REACTOME_MAPK_FAMILY_SIGNALING_CASCADES", "REACTOME_MAPK_TARGETS_NUCLEAR_EVENTS_MEDIATED_BY_MAP_KINASES", "BIOCARTA_MAPK_PATHWAY", "KEGG_MAPK_SIGNALING_PATHWAY", "REACTOME_SIGNALING_BY_EGFR")


pth_list <- list(
  "EMT" = emt_paths,
  "MYC" = myc_paths,
  "Stem" = stemness,
  "Metabolic" = metabolic_paths,
  "Lung Cancer" = histological_malignant,
  "Histological" = histological,
  "Cell Cycle" = cell_cycle,
  "MAPK" = mapk
)

# pth_df <- enframe(pth_list, name = "Pathway Type", value = "Pathway") %>%
# unnest(cols = "Pathway")
#
# pth_feats <- c("BENPORATH_MYC_MAX_TARGETS", "COLLER_MYC_TARGETS_UP", "DANG_REGULATED_BY_MYC_UP", "BENPORATH_PRC2_TARGETS", "BIOCARTA_EGF_PATHWAY_minusEGFR", "DESCARTES_FETAL_LUNG_SQUAMOUS_EPITHELIAL_CELLS", "HALLMARK_ALLOGRAFT_REJECTION", "HALLMARK_DNA_REPAIR", "HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION", "HALLMARK_GLYCOLYSIS", "HALLMARK_HEDGEHOG_SIGNALING", "HALLMARK_HYPOXIA", "HALLMARK_INTERFERON_ALPHA_RESPONSE", "HALLMARK_INTERFERON_GAMMA_RESPONSE", "HALLMARK_MTORC1_SIGNALING", "HALLMARK_MYC_TARGETS_V1", "HALLMARK_MYC_TARGETS_V2", "HALLMARK_OXIDATIVE_PHOSPHORYLATION", "HALLMARK_P53_PATHWAY", "HALLMARK_UNFOLDED_PROTEIN_RESPONSE", "HALLMARK_WNT_BETA_CATENIN_SIGNALING", "LUAD_GIRARD", "LUSC_GIRARD", "SCLC_CCLE", "WONG_EMBRYONIC_STEM_CELL_CORE")

pth_df <- DotPlotter(srt_epi, features = pth_list, cluster_groups = F, cluster_feats = F, group.by = "cell_type_epi")$data
```


```{r, fig.width = 5, fig.height = 9}
# Adjust names and filter
pth_df <- pth_df %>%
  filter(!grepl("_epithelial$", features.plot)) %>%
  filter(!grepl("TGFB", features.plot)) %>%
  mutate(pathway = case_when(
    grepl("^TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_", features.plot) ~ str_to_title(gsub("_", " ", gsub("TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_", "", features.plot))),
    features.plot == "alveolar_malignant" ~ "Alveolar Signature",
    grepl("^HALLMARK", features.plot) ~ str_to_title(gsub("_", " ", gsub("HALLMARK_", "", features.plot))),
    features.plot == "emt_i_malignant" ~ "EMT (I)",
    features.plot == "emt_ii_malignant" ~ "EMT (II)",
    features.plot == "emt_iii_malignant" ~ "EMT (III)",
    features.plot == "emt_iv_malignant" ~ "EMT (IV)",
    features.plot == "emt_i_malignant" ~ "EMT (I)",
    features.plot == "emt_i_malignant" ~ "EMT (I)",
    features.plot == "S.Score" ~ "S Score",
    features.plot == "G2M.Score" ~ "G2M Score",
    features.plot == "cell_cycle_g1_s_malignant" ~ "G1S",
    features.plot == "cell_cycle_g2_m_malignant" ~ "G2M",
    features.plot == "cell_cycle_hmg_rich_malignant" ~ "HMG Rich",
    features.plot == "myc_malignant" ~ "MYC",
    features.plot == "WONG_EMBRYONIC_STEM_CELL_CORE" ~ "Embryonic Stem Cell (Wong)",
    features.plot == "BENPORATH_PRC2_TARGETS" ~ "PRC2 Targets (Ben-Porath)",
    features.plot == "REACTOME_MAPK_FAMILY_SIGNALING_CASCADES" ~ "MAPK (Reactome)",
    features.plot == "REACTOME_MAPK_TARGETS_NUCLEAR_EVENTS_MEDIATED_BY_MAP_KINASES" ~ "Nuclear MAPK (Reactome)",
    features.plot == "REACTOME_ONCOGENIC_MAPK_SIGNALING" ~ "Oncogenic MAPK (Reactome)",
    features.plot == "BIOCARTA_MAPK_PATHWAY" ~ "MAPK (Biocarta)",
    features.plot == "KEGG_MAPK_SIGNALING_PATHWAY" ~ "MAPK (KEGG)",
    features.plot == "REACTOME_SIGNALING_BY_EGFR" ~ "EGFR (Reactome)",
    .default = features.plot
  )) %>%
  # Fix additional
  mutate(pathway = case_when(
    pathway == "Mtorc1 Signaling" ~ "MTORC1",
    pathway == "Epithelial Mesenchymal Transition" ~ "EMT",
    pathway == "Alveolar Epithelial Type 2 Cell" ~ "AT2 Cell",
    pathway == "Alveolar Epithelial Type 1 Cell" ~ "AT1 Cell",
    pathway == "Oxidative Phosphorylation" ~ "OxPhos",
    grepl("Myc", pathway) ~ gsub("Myc", "MYC", pathway),
    .default = pathway
  )) %>%
  mutate(
    pathway_source = case_when(
      grepl("_malignant$", features.plot) ~ "Malignant Metaprograms",
      grepl("_epithelial$", features.plot) ~ "Epithelial Metaprograms",
      grepl("^TRAVAGLINI", features.plot) ~ "Travaglini",
      grepl("^HALLMARK_", features.plot) ~ "Hallmark Pathways",
      features.plot %in% c("S.Score", "G2M.Score") ~ "Seurat",
      .default = "Curated"
    )
  ) %>%
  # Remove extra myc pathways since they all show the same thing
  filter(
    !(grepl("MYC", features.plot, ignore.case = T) & pathway_source == "Curated")
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(pathway_source), desc(pathway))

# constructive::construct(unique(pth_df$pathway))
pth_cat_order <- c(
  "Histological", "Lung Cancer", "MAPK", "EMT", "MYC",
  "Stem", "Metabolic", "Cell Cycle"
)

pth_order <- c(
  "G1S", "G2M", "G2M Score", "HMG Rich", "S Score",
  "EMT (I)", "EMT (II)", "EMT (III)", "EMT (IV)", "EMT",
  "LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC",
  "AT1 Cell", "AT2 Cell", "Alveolar Signature", "Basal Cell", "Proximal Basal Cell",
  "Proliferating Basal Cell", "Club Cell", "Ciliated Cell",
  "Neuroendocrine Cell", "MYC", "MYC Targets V1", "MYC Targets V2",
  "Glycolysis", "Oxidative Phosphorylation", "MTORC1", "Embryonic Stem Cell (Wong)",
  "PRC2 Targets (Ben-Porath)",
  "MAPK (KEGG)", "MAPK (Biocarta)", "MAPK (Reactome)", "Nuclear MAPK (Reactome)", "EGFR (Reactome)"
)

pth_df <- pth_df %>%
  mutate(
    pathway = fct_relevel(pathway, rev(pth_order)),
    feature.groups = fct_relevel(feature.groups, pth_cat_order)
  )

p1 <- pth_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = "Pathway Source", y = pathway)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = pathway_source), color = "black") +
  scale_fill_pander() +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme(
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y = element_blank(), legend.position = "left", strip.background = element_blank(), strip.text = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(angle = 90),
    fill = guide_legend(keywidth = 0.5, keyheight = 0.5)
  ) +
  facet_grid(feature.groups ~ ., scales = "free", space = "free") +
  labs(y = NULL, x = NULL, fill = "Pathway Source")


p2 <- pth_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = id, y = pathway)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = avg.exp.scaled), color = "black") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "inferno") +
  facet_grid(feature.groups ~ ., scales = "free", space = "free") +
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(angle = 90),
    x.sec = guide_axis(angle = 90),
    fill = guide_colorbar(keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 3)
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_blank(), panel.border = element_blank(),
    strip.background.y = element_blank(),
    strip.text.y.right = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0)
  ) +
  labs(y = NULL, x = NULL, fill = "Scaled\nExpression")

sig_heatplot <- (p1 + theme(plot.margin = margin(l = 0.25, r = 1, unit = "mm"))) + (p2 + theme(plot.margin = margin(r = 0.25, unit = "mm"), axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank())) + plot_layout(guides = "collect", ncol = 2, widths = c(0.03, 1)) + plot_annotation(theme = theme(legend.position = "bottom")) &
  theme(panel.spacing = unit(1, "mm"), panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5), legend.box.margin = margin()) &
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
ggsave(sig_heatplot, file = here("plots", "epi_types_signature_heatmap.pdf"), width = 5, height = 9)
sig_heatplot
```

#### Signature tumor boxplots

```{r, fig.width = 8, fig.height = 3}
pths <- map(pathways$pathway, .f = function(pth) {
  grep(pth, colnames(srt_epi@meta.data), value = T)
}) %>%
  unlist() %>%
  unique()

# pths <- c(pathways$pathway, paste0(names(meta_programs$malignant), "_malignant"), "LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC")

pls <- map(pths, .f = function(g) {
  sample_plots <- srt_epi@meta.data %>%
    filter(is_tumor_cell) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(sample_id_new, .data[[g]], mean), y = .data[[g]])) +
    geom_violin(scale = "width", aes(fill = time_point)) +
    geom_boxplot(fill = "white", width = 0.2, outliers = F) +
    # ggrastr::rasterize(geom_jitter(size = 0.05, alpha = 0.25), dpi = 300) +
    facet_grid(. ~ time_point, scales = "free", space = "free") +
    guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90)) +
    labs(x = "Sample ID", y = glue("{g} signature score")) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      strip.background.x = element_part_rect(side = ""),
      panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA),
      axis.line = element_blank()
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors$time_point)

  summarized_plots <- srt_epi@meta.data %>%
    group_by(sample_id_new, time_point, is_tumor_cell) %>%
    filter(is_tumor_cell) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(mean_exp = mean(.data[[g]])) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = time_point, y = mean_exp, color = time_point)) +
    geom_boxplot(outliers = F) +
    geom_quasirandom(size = 0.5) +
    labs(x = "Time Point", y = glue("LUAD signature"), color = "Timepoint") +
    guides(
      x = guide_axis(angle = 0),
      y = guide_axis(cap = "upper")
    ) +
    ggpubr::geom_pwc(method = "t_test", tip.length = 0, label = "p.adj.signif") +
    theme(legend.position = "none") +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    scale_color_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = glue("{g} signature score\n(per sample mean)"))
  summarized_plots

  # pcomb <- sample_plots + summarized_plots + plot_layout(guides = "collect", axes = "collect", widths = c(1, 0.075)) & theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8))
  # ggsave(pcomb, file = here("plots", "luad_signature_violin.pdf"), width = 8, height = 3)
  # pcomb
})
names(pls) <- pths

pdf(file = here("plots", "epi_tumor_summarized_sigs_boxplot.pdf"), width = 2.5, height = 4)
print(pls)
dev.off()
```


Single table so I can plot select pathways of interest

```{r, fig.width = 8, fig.height = 9}
select_paths <- unique(sig_heatplot$data$features.plot)
select_paths_name <- unique(sig_heatplot$data$pathway)

all_sig_summary <- srt_epi@meta.data %>%
  group_by(sample_id_new, time_point, is_tumor_cell) %>%
  filter(is_tumor_cell) %>%
  summarize(across(all_of(select_paths), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = T))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(select_paths), names_to = "features.plot", values_to = "Score") %>%
  group_by(features.plot) %>%
  mutate(Score_Scaled = scale(Score)[, 1]) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(pathway = case_when(
    grepl("^TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_", features.plot) ~ str_to_title(gsub("_", " ", gsub("TRAVAGLINI_LUNG_", "", features.plot))),
    features.plot == "alveolar_malignant" ~ "Alveolar Signature",
    grepl("^HALLMARK", features.plot) ~ str_to_title(gsub("_", " ", gsub("HALLMARK_", "", features.plot))),
    features.plot == "emt_i_malignant" ~ "EMT (I)",
    features.plot == "emt_ii_malignant" ~ "EMT (II)",
    features.plot == "emt_iii_malignant" ~ "EMT (III)",
    features.plot == "emt_iv_malignant" ~ "EMT (IV)",
    features.plot == "emt_i_malignant" ~ "EMT (I)",
    features.plot == "emt_i_malignant" ~ "EMT (I)",
    features.plot == "S.Score" ~ "S Score",
    features.plot == "G2M.Score" ~ "G2M Score",
    features.plot == "cell_cycle_g1_s_malignant" ~ "G1S",
    features.plot == "cell_cycle_g2_m_malignant" ~ "G2M",
    features.plot == "cell_cycle_hmg_rich_malignant" ~ "HMG Rich",
    features.plot == "myc_malignant" ~ "MYC",
    features.plot == "WONG_EMBRYONIC_STEM_CELL_CORE" ~ "Embryonic Stem Cell (Wong)",
    features.plot == "BENPORATH_PRC2_TARGETS" ~ "PRC2 Targets (Ben-Porath)",
    features.plot == "REACTOME_MAPK_FAMILY_SIGNALING_CASCADES" ~ "MAPK (Reactome)",
    features.plot == "REACTOME_MAPK_TARGETS_NUCLEAR_EVENTS_MEDIATED_BY_MAP_KINASES" ~ "Nuclear MAPK (Reactome)",
    features.plot == "REACTOME_ONCOGENIC_MAPK_SIGNALING" ~ "Oncogenic MAPK (Reactome)",
    features.plot == "BIOCARTA_MAPK_PATHWAY" ~ "MAPK (Biocarta)",
    features.plot == "KEGG_MAPK_SIGNALING_PATHWAY" ~ "MAPK (KEGG)",
    features.plot == "REACTOME_SIGNALING_BY_EGFR" ~ "EGFR (Reactome)",
    .default = features.plot
  )) %>%
  # Fix additional
  mutate(pathway = case_when(
    pathway == "Mtorc1 Signaling" ~ "MTORC1",
    pathway == "Epithelial Mesenchymal Transition" ~ "EMT",
    pathway == "Alveolar Epithelial Type 2 Cell" ~ "AT2 Cell",
    pathway == "Alveolar Epithelial Type 1 Cell" ~ "AT1 Cell",
    pathway == "Oxidative Phosphorylation" ~ "OxPhos",
    grepl("Myc", pathway) ~ gsub("Myc", "MYC", pathway),
    .default = pathway
  ))

p <- all_sig_summary %>%
  filter(pathway %in% select_paths_name) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = time_point, y = Score)) +
  geom_boxplot(outliers = F, size = 0.5, aes(fill = time_point), width = 0.9) +
  geom_quasirandom(size = 1, alpha = 0.6, color = "black", aes(fill = time_point), stroke = 0.25, pch = 21, width = 0.3) +
  facet_wrap(~pathway, scales = "free", strip.position = "left", ncol = 6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(legend.position = "none", strip.background = element_blank(), strip.clip = "off", strip.placement = "outside") +
  ggpubr::geom_pwc(tip.length = 0, method = "t_test", label.size = 2, label = "p.adj.signif", p.adjust.method = "BH") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.1))) +
  labs(x = "Timepoint") +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45))
ggsave(p, file = here("plots", "epi_sig_tumor_specific_boxplots_select.pdf"), width = 8.5, height = 11)
p
```


##### For Main

```{r, fig.width = 8, fig.height = 2.5}
select_paths_main <- c("Alveolar Signature", "LUAD", "Nuclear MAPK (Reactome)", "MYC", "Proliferating Basal Cell", "EMT")
p <- all_sig_summary %>%
  filter(pathway %in% select_paths_main) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = time_point, y = Score)) +
  # geom_violin(aes(fill = time_point), scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(outliers = F, size = 0.5, aes(fill = time_point), width = 0.9) +
  geom_quasirandom(size = 1, alpha = 0.6, color = "black", aes(fill = time_point), stroke = 0.25, pch = 21, width = 0.3) +
  facet_wrap(~ fct_relevel(pathway, select_paths_main), scales = "free", nrow = 1, strip.position = "left") +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(legend.position = "none", strip.background = element_blank(), strip.text.y = element_text(size = 10), strip.clip = "off", strip.placement = "outside", panel.spacing = unit(0, "mm")) +
  ggpubr::geom_pwc(tip.length = 0, method = "t_test", label.size = 2, label = "p.adj.signif", p.adjust.method = "BH", step.increase = 0.075) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.05))) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45))
ggsave(p, file = here("plots", "epi_tumor_boxplot_main.pdf"), width = 8, height = 2.6)
p
```



## Figure 4 -- MAPKalt

```{r}
srt_tum <- srt_epi[, srt_epi$is_tumor_cell]
```


### Pathway overlaps?

```{r}
plist <- split(pathways_v2$Gene, pathways_v2$pathway)

meta_programs_df <- read.table(file = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mjz1/meta_programs_tirosh/refs/heads/main/tirosh_mp_patched.txt", header = T, sep = "\t")

meta_programs <- split(meta_programs_df, meta_programs_df$cell_type)

meta_programs <- map(meta_programs, .f = function(x) {
  res <- split(x, x$meta_program)
  map(res, .f = function(y) y$Gene)
})

names(meta_programs) <- janitor::make_clean_names(names(meta_programs))

sel_paths <- c("LUAD_GIRARD", "REACTOME_MAPK_TARGETS_NUCLEAR_EVENTS_MEDIATED_BY_MAP_KINASES", "BIOCARTA_MAPK_PATHWAY", "KEGG_MAPK_SIGNALING_PATHWAY")

plist_sel <- list(
  "Alveolar" = meta_programs$malignant$alveolar,
  "LUAD" = plist$LUAD_GIRARD,
  "Nuclear MAPK (Reactome)" = plist$REACTOME_MAPK_TARGETS_NUCLEAR_EVENTS_MEDIATED_BY_MAP_KINASES,
  "MAPK (KEGG)" = plist$KEGG_MAPK_SIGNALING_PATHWAY,
  "MAPK (Biocarta)" = plist$BIOCARTA_MAPK_PATHWAY
)

plist_sel <- map(plist_sel, unique)

library(eulerr)
fit <- euler(plist_sel)
pdf(here("plots", "mapk_path_overlaps.pdf"), width = 5, height = 5)
plot(fit, quantities = TRUE, legend = T)
dev.off()


plist_sel <- list(
  "Alveolar" = meta_programs$malignant$alveolar,
  "LUAD" = plist$LUAD_GIRARD,
  "LUSC" = plist$LUSC_GIRARD,
  "SCLC" = plist$SCLC_CCLE,
  "Nuclear MAPK (Reactome)" = plist$REACTOME_MAPK_TARGETS_NUCLEAR_EVENTS_MEDIATED_BY_MAP_KINASES,
  "MAPK (KEGG)" = plist$KEGG_MAPK_SIGNALING_PATHWAY,
  "MAPK (Biocarta)" = plist$BIOCARTA_MAPK_PATHWAY
)

plist_sel <- map(plist_sel, unique)

library(eulerr)
fit <- euler(plist_sel)
pdf(here("plots", "mapk_path_overlaps_extended.pdf"), width = 7, height = 7)
plot(fit, quantities = TRUE, legend = F)
dev.off()
```


### MAPK correlations

Supervised pathway correlations

```{r, fig.width = 9, fig.height = 3}
# paths <- c("REACTOME_MAPK_TARGETS_NUCLEAR_EVENTS_MEDIATED_BY_MAP_KINASES", "BIOCARTA_MAPK_PATHWAY", "KEGG_MAPK_SIGNALING_PATHWAY")
#
paths <- c("Nuclear MAPK (Reactome)", "MAPK (Biocarta)", "MAPK (KEGG)")
all_sig_summary_wide <- all_sig_summary %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c("sample_id_new", "time_point"), names_from = pathway, values_from = Score)



pls <- map(paths, .f = function(pth) {
  p <- all_sig_summary_wide %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = .data[[pth]], y = LUAD)) +
    stat_ellipse(
      data = all_sig_summary_wide[all_sig_summary_wide$time_point != "MRD", ],
      aes(fill = time_point),
      type = "t",
      geom = "polygon",
      alpha = 0.3, show.legend = F
    ) +
    geom_point(aes(fill = time_point), pch = 21, stroke = 0.5, size = 2.5) +
    geom_line(stat = "smooth", method = "lm", color = "#063970", se = F, linewidth = 1.25, alpha = 0.75) +
    ggpubr::stat_cor() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors$time_point, breaks = names(colors$time_point)) +
    # scale_color_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
    theme_classic() +
    labs(y = "LUAD Signature", fill = "Timepoint", x = pth) +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3.5)))
})

pcomb <- wrap_plots(pls, nrow = 1, guides = "collect", axes = "collect") & theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"), axis.line = element_blank())
ggsave(pcomb, file = here("plots", "luad_mapk_select_cors.pdf"), width = 8, height = 2.75)
pcomb
```


```{r}
paths <- c("Nuclear MAPK (Reactome)", "MAPK (Biocarta)", "MAPK (KEGG)")
all_sig_summary_wide <- all_sig_summary %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c("sample_id_new", "time_point"), names_from = pathway, values_from = Score)



pls <- map(paths, .f = function(pth) {
  p <- all_sig_summary_wide %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = .data[[pth]], y = .data[["Alveolar Signature"]])) +
    stat_ellipse(
      data = all_sig_summary_wide[all_sig_summary_wide$time_point != "MRD", ],
      aes(fill = time_point),
      type = "t",
      geom = "polygon",
      alpha = 0.3, show.legend = F
    ) +
    geom_point(aes(fill = time_point), pch = 21, stroke = 0.5, size = 2.5) +
    geom_line(stat = "smooth", method = "lm", color = "#063970", se = F, linewidth = 1.25, alpha = 0.75) +
    ggpubr::stat_cor() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors$time_point, breaks = names(colors$time_point)) +
    # scale_color_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
    theme_classic() +
    labs(y = "Alveolar Signature", fill = "Timepoint", x = pth) +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3.5)))
})

pcomb <- wrap_plots(pls, nrow = 1, guides = "collect", axes = "collect") & theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"), axis.line = element_blank())
ggsave(pcomb, file = here("plots", "alveolar_mapk_select_cors.pdf"), width = 8, height = 2.75)
pcomb
```

LUAD vs alveolar

```{r}
p <- all_sig_summary_wide %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = LUAD, y = .data[["Alveolar Signature"]])) +
  stat_ellipse(
    data = all_sig_summary_wide[all_sig_summary_wide$time_point != "MRD", ],
    aes(fill = time_point),
    type = "t",
    geom = "polygon",
    alpha = 0.3, show.legend = F
  ) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = time_point), pch = 21, stroke = 0.5, size = 2.5) +
  geom_line(stat = "smooth", method = "lm", color = "#063970", se = F, linewidth = 1.25, alpha = 0.75) +
  ggpubr::stat_cor() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$time_point, breaks = names(colors$time_point)) +
  # scale_color_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(y = "Alveolar Signature", fill = "Timepoint", x = "LUAD Signature") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3.5)))
p
ggsave(p, file = here("plots", "luad_vs_alveolar_tumorcells.pdf"), width = 4, height = 4)
```



```{r, fig.width = 9, fig.height = 3}
pcomb2 <- wrap_plots(pls, ncol = 1, guides = "collect") + plot_layout(axes = "collect") & theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"), axis.line = element_blank()) # legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "vertical", legend.title.position = "left"
ggsave(pcomb2, file = here("plots", "luad_mapk_select_cors_vertical.pdf"), width = 3.9, height = 7)
# pcomb
```

Omnibus

```{r}
corres <- all_sig_summary_wide %>%
  select(all_of(colnames(all_sig_summary_wide)[3:ncol(all_sig_summary_wide)])) %>%
  as.matrix() %>%
  Hmisc::rcorr(type = "pearson")

library(ggcorrplot)
cormat <- corres$r

pmat <- corres$P

pdat <- ggcorrplot(
  corr = cormat,
  type = "lower",
  hc.order = T,
  p.mat = pmat,
  insig = "pch"
)$data %>%
  rstatix::add_significance(p.col = "pvalue") %>%
  rstatix::adjust_pvalue(p.col = "pvalue", method = "bonferroni") %>%
  rstatix::add_significance(p.col = "pvalue.adj") %>%
  mutate(sig = ifelse(pvalue.adj < 0.05, "*", "ns"))

p <- ggcorrplot(
  corr = cormat,
  type = "lower",
  hc.order = T,
  legend.title = bquote("Pearson's R")
)

ylab_anno <- data.frame(lab = levels(pdat$Var1), y = levels(pdat$Var1), x = (1:ncol(cormat)) - 1)
axis_tx_sz <- 7

p <- p +
  geom_text(data = pdat[pdat$pvalue.adj < 0.05, ], aes(label = sig), size = 3, nudge_y = -0.3) +
  # labs(title = str_split(nm, pattern = "__", simplify = T)[2]) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90)) +

  geom_text(inherit.aes = F, data = ylab_anno, aes(x = x, y = y, label = lab), hjust = 1, size = axis_tx_sz * 0.33) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(
    axis.text.y.left = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x.bottom = element_text(size = axis_tx_sz), plot.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 10, unit = "lines"),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )
p
```


```{r}
cor_res <- all_sig_summary_wide %>%
  correlation::correlation(select = colnames(all_sig_summary_wide)[3:ncol(all_sig_summary_wide)])

p <- plot(cor_res) +
  ggraph::scale_edge_color_gradient2(low = scales::muted("blue"), high = scales::muted("red"))

p2 <- plot(summary(cor_res), show_data = "points") +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90))
```



### Within sample correlations

```{r}
library(easystats)
x <- srt_epi@meta.data %>%
  filter(is_tumor_cell) %>%
  mutate(sample_id_new = factor(sample_id_new)) %>%
  add_count(sample_id_new, name = "n_cells") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(sample_id_new) %>%
  correlation::correlation(select = c("LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC"), select2 = c("BIOCARTA_MAPK_PATHWAY", "KEGG_MAPK_SIGNALING_PATHWAY", "REACTOME_MAPK_TARGETS_NUCLEAR_EVENTS_MEDIATED_BY_MAP_KINASES"), method = "spearman") %>%
  left_join(distinct(srt_epi@meta.data[, c("sample_id_new", "time_point")]), by = c("Group" = "sample_id_new")) %>%
  mutate(
    mapk_path = case_when(
      Parameter2 == "BIOCARTA_MAPK_PATHWAY" ~ "MAPK (Biocarta)",
      Parameter2 == "KEGG_MAPK_SIGNALING_PATHWAY" ~ "MAPK (KEGG)",
      Parameter2 == "REACTOME_MAPK_TARGETS_NUCLEAR_EVENTS_MEDIATED_BY_MAP_KINASES" ~ "Nuclear MAPK (Reactome)",
      .default = Parameter2
    )
  )
```


```{r, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 10}
# x <- x %>%
#   arrange((p)) %>%
#   mutate(dir = sign(rho),
#          sig = p<0.05) %>%
#   mutate(sig_label = case_when(
#     sig & dir == 1 ~ "pos",
#     sig & dir == -1 ~ "neg",
#     !sig ~ "ns"
#   ))
#
# # For each what is the proportion of significant samples
# # prop_sig <- x %>%
# #   group_by(time_point, Parameter1, Parameter2) %>%
# #   summarize(n = n(), n_sig_pos = sum(p<0.05& rho>0) , n_sig_neg = sum(p<0.05 & rho<0)) %>%
# #   pivot_longer(cols = c(n_sig_pos, n_sig_neg), names_to = "dir", values_to = "n_dir") %>%
# #   mutate(prop = n_dir / n)
# #
# x %>%
#   # filter(sig_label != "ns") %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x = as.factor(1), fill = fct_relevel(sig_label, "ns"))) +
#   geom_bar(width = 1, position = "fill") +
#   coord_radial(theta = "y", expand = F) +
#   facet_nested(time_point~Parameter2+Parameter1, scales = "free")
```

Plot for main

```{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 3.5}
p <- x %>%
  filter(Parameter2 == "REACTOME_MAPK_TARGETS_NUCLEAR_EVENTS_MEDIATED_BY_MAP_KINASES") %>%
  arrange(desc(p)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Parameter1, y = rho)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  gghalves::geom_half_boxplot(outliers = F, aes(fill = Parameter1), errorbar.draw = T) +
  gghalves::geom_half_point_panel(aes(size = -log10(p), fill = Parameter1, alpha = n_Obs), pch = 21) +
  # gghalves::geom_half_point_panel(data = pl_dat[pl_dat$p < 0.05,], aes(size = -log10(p), fill = Parameter1), pch = 21) +
  # gghalves::geom_half_point_panel(data = pl_dat[pl_dat$p >= 0.05,], aes(size = -log10(p)), fill = "grey", pch = 21) +
  # geom_jitter(aes(size = -log10(p), fill = Parameter1), pch = 21) +
  facet_nested("Within sample correlations" ~ mapk_path + time_point) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$histology_predominant_short) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(trans = "log10", breaks = scales::breaks_log(), labels = scales::label_number(big.mark = ",")) +
  guides(
    fill = "none",
    x = guide_axis(angle = 0),
    size = guide_legend(override.aes = list(pch = 19)),
    alpha = guide_legend(override.aes = list(pch = 16, size = 3))
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_pwc(tip.length = 0, label = "p.adj.signif", step.increase = 0.05, vjust = 0.5, hide.ns = T, bracket.nudge.y = 0.075) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    strip.clip = "off",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12), plot.title.position = "panel",
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Lineage Signature", y = bquote("Spearman's" ~ rho), size = bquote("-log10"[Padj]), alpha = "No. cells")
ggsave(p, file = here("plots", "per_sample_mapk_cor_main.pdf"), width = 6, height = 3.5)
p
```


Plot for supp

```{r, fig.width = 11, fig.height = 3.5}
p <- x %>%
  filter(Parameter2 != "REACTOME_MAPK_TARGETS_NUCLEAR_EVENTS_MEDIATED_BY_MAP_KINASES") %>%
  arrange(desc(p)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Parameter1, y = rho)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  gghalves::geom_half_boxplot(outliers = F, aes(fill = Parameter1), errorbar.draw = T) +
  gghalves::geom_half_point_panel(aes(size = -log10(p), fill = Parameter1, alpha = n_Obs), pch = 21) +
  # gghalves::geom_half_point_panel(data = pl_dat[pl_dat$p < 0.05,], aes(size = -log10(p), fill = Parameter1), pch = 21) +
  # gghalves::geom_half_point_panel(data = pl_dat[pl_dat$p >= 0.05,], aes(size = -log10(p)), fill = "grey", pch = 21) +
  # geom_jitter(aes(size = -log10(p), fill = Parameter1), pch = 21) +
  facet_nested("Within sample correlations" ~ mapk_path + time_point) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$histology_predominant_short) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(trans = "log10", breaks = scales::breaks_log(), labels = scales::label_number(big.mark = ",")) +
  guides(
    fill = "none",
    x = guide_axis(angle = 0),
    size = guide_legend(override.aes = list(pch = 19)),
    alpha = guide_legend(override.aes = list(pch = 16, size = 3))
  ) +
  ggpubr::geom_pwc(tip.length = 0, label = "p.adj.signif", step.increase = 0.05, vjust = 0.5, hide.ns = T, bracket.nudge.y = 0.075) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    strip.background.x = element_part_rect(side = "b", fill = NA, color = "black"),
    strip.clip = "off",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12), plot.title.position = "panel",
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Lineage Signature", y = bquote("Spearman's" ~ rho), size = bquote("-log10"[Padj]), alpha = "No. cells")
ggsave(p, file = here("plots", "per_sample_mapk_cor_supp.pdf"), width = 11, height = 3.5)
p
```



```{r}
attributes(x)$modelframe %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = REACTOME_MAPK_TARGETS_NUCLEAR_EVENTS_MEDIATED_BY_MAP_KINASES, y = LUAD)) +
  geom_density2d_filled() +
  ggpubr::stat_cor(method = "spearman") +
  scattermore::geom_scattermore(pointsize = 1, pixels = c(256, 256)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```


### MAPKalt LUAD

First just use IMPACT definitions

```{r, fig.width = 15, fig.height = 9}
library(gt)
supp <- read.table(here("metadata", "supplemental_mapk_mutation_table_edit.txt"), header = T, sep = "\t")
supp$useInferCNV <- grepl("inferCNV", supp$notes_other)

useinfer <- supp$sample_id[supp$useInferCNV]

samp_ord <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(time_point == "PD", sample_id_new %in% srt_tum@meta.data$sample_id_new) %>%
  mutate(ord = fct_reorder(sample_id_new, LUAD, mean)) %>%
  pull(ord) %>%
  levels()

p0 <- db$metadata %>%
  filter(time_point == "PD", sample_id_new %in% srt_tum@meta.data$sample_id_new) %>%
  select(sample_id, sample_id_new, has_impact, EGFR_Primary, EGFR_Secondary, MAPKalt) %>%
  mutate(sample_id_new = fct_relevel(sample_id_new, samp_ord)) %>%
  mutate(useInfer = sample_id %in% useinfer) %>%
  arrange(desc(sample_id_new)) %>%
  gt::gt(rowname_col = "sample_id_new")

p1 <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(time_point == "PD") %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = fct_relevel(sample_id_new, samp_ord), x = LUAD)) +
  geom_violin(scale = "width", aes(fill = time_point), show.legend = F) +
  geom_pointrange(
    stat = "summary", fatten = 0.1,
    fun.min = function(z) {
      quantile(z, 0.25)
    },
    fun.max = function(z) {
      quantile(z, 0.75)
    },
    fun = median, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), orientation = "y"
  ) +
  # facet_grid(. ~ secondary_mapk_binned, scales = "free", space = "free") +
  # guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90)) +
  labs(y = "Sample", x = "LUAD signature score") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
    strip.background.x = element_blank()
  )

pcomb <- wrap_table(p0, space = "fixed") + p1
pcomb
```


Get inferCNV measures

```{r}
tumor_sce <- db$infercnv
tumor_sce <- tumor_sce[, colnames(srt_tum)]
tumor_sce <- scatools::overlap_genes(tumor_sce, ensDb = EnsDb.Hsapiens.v86::EnsDb.Hsapiens.v86, gene_biotype = "protein_coding")
impact_paths <- read.table(here("impact", "impact_mapping.txt"), header = T, sep = "\t")

tier1 <- c("EGFR", "MET", "ERBB2", "PIK3CA", "BRAF", "KRAS")
tier2 <- c("FGFR1", "FGFR2", "FGFR3", "FGFR4", "ALK", "RET", "ROS1", "RAC1", "MAPK1")


cna_df <- pbmcapply::pbmclapply(X = impact_paths$Gene[impact_paths$pathway == "rtk_ras"], mc.cores = 16, FUN = function(g) {
  try(df <- scatools::plot_gene_cna(sce = tumor_sce, gene = g, return_data = T)[, c("cell_id", g)])
})
names(cna_df) <- impact_paths$Gene[impact_paths$pathway == "rtk_ras"]
x <- map(cna_df, nrow)
genes_cnv <- names(cna_df[!(map(x, is.null) %>% unlist())])[-1]

cna_df <- cna_df[!(map(x, is.null) %>% unlist())] %>%
  purrr::reduce(full_join)

spl <- str_split(cna_df$cell_id, pattern = "_", simplify = T)
cna_df$sample_id <- spl[, 2]


cna_df_means <- cna_df %>%
  group_by(sample_id) %>%
  summarize(across(genes_cnv, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = T)))
```


```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height =5}
amp_thresh <- 1.05

cnv_df_long <- cna_df_means %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = !sample_id, values_to = "inferCNV", names_to = "Gene")
cnv_df_long$inferCNV_amp <- cnv_df_long$inferCNV > amp_thresh
cnv_df_long$inferCNV_amp_conf <- ifelse(cnv_df_long$inferCNV > 1.1, "high", "low")

cnv_df_long <- filter(cnv_df_long, inferCNV_amp) %>%
  unite(infercnv, Gene, inferCNV_amp_conf, sep = ": ", remove = F)

cnv_df_add <- cnv_df_long %>%
  filter(Gene %in% c("EGFR", "MET", "ERBB2", "FGFR1", "FGFR2", "FGFR3", "FGFR4", "PIK3CA", "BRAF", "KRAS")) %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = "sample_id", names_from = "inferCNV_amp_conf", values_from = "Gene", values_fn = function(x) paste0(x, collapse = ";"), values_fill = "", names_prefix = "infercnv_")

test <- left_join(db$metadata, cnv_df_add)
```


```{r}
p0 <- test %>%
  filter(time_point == "PD", sample_id_new %in% srt_tum@meta.data$sample_id_new) %>%
  select(sample_id, sample_id_new, has_impact, EGFR_Primary, EGFR_Secondary, MAPKalt, infercnv_low, infercnv_high) %>%
  mutate(sample_id_new = fct_relevel(sample_id_new, samp_ord)) %>%
  mutate(useInfer = sample_id %in% useinfer) %>%
  # arrange(desc(sample_id_new)) %>%
  gt::gt(rowname_col = "sample_id_new")
pcomb <- wrap_table(p0, space = "fixed") + p1
pcomb
```


```{r}
p0 <- test %>%
  filter(sample_id_new %in% srt_tum@meta.data$sample_id_new) %>%
  select(sample_id, sample_id_new, has_impact, EGFR_Primary, EGFR_Secondary, MAPKalt, infercnv_low, infercnv_high) %>%
  mutate(sample_id_new = fct_relevel(sample_id_new, samp_ord)) %>%
  mutate(useInfer = sample_id %in% useinfer) %>%
  # arrange(desc(sample_id_new)) %>%
  gt::gt(rowname_col = "sample_id_new")
```

Use this table to assign samples as secondary mapk or not

```{r}
p <- VlnPlot(srt_tum[, srt_tum$time_point == "PD"], group.by = "sample_id_new", sort = T, features = c(tier1, tier2), pt.size = 0, combine = F)
names(p) <- c(tier1, tier2)
```


TODO: Add for Pre and On

```{r}
secondary_mapk <- c(
  "PD1" = "EGFR_amp",
  "PD2" = "EGFR_amp",
  "PD3" = "EGFR_amp, ALK_fus",
  "PD4" = "MET_ampinf, BRAF_ampinf, EGFR_ampinf", # check focal amp signal -- these are whole chr events
  "PD5" = "EGFR_amp, KIT_amp",
  "PD6" = "NA",
  "PD7" = "EGFR_amp", # ROS1 high
  "PD8" = "MET_amp",
  "PD9" = "EGFR_amp, KRAS_amp",
  "PD10" = "MAP2K4_W175*", # Does this count? ROS1 high
  "PD11" = "ERBB2_amp, NF1_Q1235*", # ERBB2 not highly expressed, unclear if it belongs
  "PD12" = "MAP3K1_Q535*", # Does this count?
  "PD14" = "MET_ampinf", # Strange -- annotated as on-target from clinical table but not sure why -- different exon19 event
  "PD15" = "MET_amp",
  "PD16" = "EGFR_amp, MET_ampinf", # MET seems real inferCNV
  "PD17" = "ALK_fus, EGFR_ampinf",
  "PD18" = "NA", # No MET
  "PD20" = "NA", # No IMPACT
  "PD21" = "BRAF_fus",
  "PD22" = "EGFR_amp",
  "PD23" = "NA", # RET expression
  "PD24" = "NA",
  "PD25" = "NA", # Bit of KRAS
  "PD26" = "EGFR_C797S", # LUSC transformed; RAC1 high
  "PD27" = "EGFR_amp",
  "PD28" = "FGFR1_ampinf",
  "PD29" = "MAPK1_amp", # inferCNV agrees
  "PD30" = "MET_ampinf", # Need infercnv, met amp possibly
  "MRD1" = "NA",
  "MRD2" = "EGFR_amp",
  "MRD5" = "EGFR_amp",
  "MRD6" = "NA"
)

# Replace names

names(secondary_mapk) <- sample_id_map$sample_id_new[match(names(secondary_mapk), sample_id_map$sample_id_new_v1)]

mapk_df <- enframe(secondary_mapk, name = "sample_id", value = "secondary_mapk")
write.table(mapk_df, file = here("tables", "secondary_mapk.txt"), quote = F, sep = "\t", row.names = F, col.names = T)
no_mapk <- names(which(secondary_mapk == "NA"))
```


```{r}
srt_tum$secondary_mapk <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  mutate(secondary_mapk = case_when(
    time_point %in% c("TN", "MRD") ~ NA,
    sample_id_new %in% no_mapk ~ "Unknown",
    .default = "MAPKalt"
  )) %>%
  pull(secondary_mapk)

samp_ord <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(time_point == "PD") %>%
  mutate(sample_id_new = fct_reorder(sample_id_new, -LUAD, median)) %>%
  pull(sample_id_new) %>%
  levels()


p1 <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(time_point == "PD") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(sample_id_new, samp_ord), y = LUAD)) +
  # ggplot(aes(x = sample_id_new, y = LUAD)) +

  geom_violin(scale = "width", aes(fill = time_point), show.legend = F) +
  geom_pointrange(
    stat = "summary", fatten = 0.1,
    fun.min = function(z) {
      quantile(z, 0.25)
    },
    fun.max = function(z) {
      quantile(z, 0.75)
    },
    fun = median, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)
  ) +
  facet_grid(. ~ secondary_mapk, scales = "free", space = "free") +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90)) +
  labs(x = "Sample", y = "LUAD score") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
    strip.background.x = element_blank()
  )

p2 <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(time_point == "PD") %>%
  group_by(sample_id, secondary_mapk, time_point) %>%
  summarize(LUAD = mean(LUAD)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = secondary_mapk, y = LUAD)) +
  geom_boxplot(outliers = F, aes(fill = time_point), show.legend = F) +
  geom_quasirandom(size = 0.3, pch = 1) +
  ggpubr::geom_pwc(tip.length = 0, label = "p.signif") +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "LUAD score\n(per sample means)") +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_classic()

pcomb <- p1 + p2 + plot_layout(nrow = 1, widths = c(1, 0.1), guides = "collect") & theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6))
ggsave(pcomb, file = here("plots", "mapk_alt_luad_sig_relapsed_v2.pdf"), width = 5, height = 2.5)
pcomb
```


Create a plot with the mutations annotated in a bar on the side, and notable genes expression in a box heat encoding

```{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4.25}
mapk_alt_df <- enframe(secondary_mapk, name = "sample_id_new", value = "variant_list") %>%
  separate_rows(variant_list, sep = ", ") %>%
  separate(variant_list, sep = "_", into = c("Gene", "Variant_Type"), remove = F) %>%
  mutate(
    infercnv = grepl("inf", Variant_Type),
    Variant_Type = gsub("inf", "", Variant_Type),
    Gene = case_when(
      grepl("NA", Gene) ~ NA,
      .default = Gene
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(secondary_mapk = case_when(
    sample_id_new %in% no_mapk ~ "Unknown",
    .default = "MAPKalt"
  )) %>%
  tidyr::complete(nesting(sample_id_new, secondary_mapk), Gene, fill = list(Variant_Type = "NoAlt")) %>%
  mutate(Variant_Type = fct_recode(Variant_Type,
    "Amp" = "amp",
    "Fusion" = "fus"
  )) %>%
  filter(!grepl("MRD", sample_id_new))



var_order <- names(table(mapk_alt_df$Variant_Type) %>% sort(decreasing = T))
var_order <- c(var_order[-1], "NoAlt")

gene_ord <- mapk_alt_df[!is.na(mapk_alt_df$Gene) & mapk_alt_df$Variant_Type != "NoAlt", ]$Gene %>%
  table() %>%
  sort(decreasing = T)

p3 <- mapk_alt_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Gene)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = fct_relevel(Gene, rev(names(gene_ord))), x = fct_relevel(sample_id_new, samp_ord))) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = fct_relevel(Variant_Type, var_order))) +
  geom_point(
    data = mapk_alt_df[mapk_alt_df$infercnv & !is.na(mapk_alt_df$infercnv), ],
    aes(color = "inferCNV"), show.legend = F
  ) +
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(angle = 90),
    fill = guide_legend(order = 1, keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 0.4, ncol = 2, theme = theme(legend.margin = margin()))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "NoAlt" = "white",
      "Amp" = "#4477AA",
      "Fusion" = "#88CCEE",
      "C797S" = "#117733",
      "Q1235*" = "#DDCC77",
      "Q535*" = "#332288",
      "W175*" = "#999933"
    ),
    breaks = var_order[-length(var_order)]
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = "black") +
  # scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  facet_grid(. ~ secondary_mapk, scales = "free", space = "free") +
  labs(x = "Sample", y = "Gene", fill = "Variant", color = NULL)
p1 <- p1 + theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), axis.title.x = element_blank())

p3 <- p3 + theme_few() + theme(strip.text.x = element_blank(), strip.background.x = element_blank(), legend.background = element_blank(), plot.background = element_blank(), panel.grid = element_line(color = "grey50", linetype = "solid", linewidth = 1, colour = "black"))

pcomb <- (p1) + free(p2, type = "space", side = "b") + free(p3, type = "space") + plot_spacer() + plot_layout(ncol = 2, widths = c(1, 0.1)) +
  plot_annotation(theme = theme(plot.margin = margin(3, 8, 15, 12, unit = "mm")))
ggsave(pcomb, file = here("plots", "mapk_alt_luad_sig_relapsed_plus_muts_v2.pdf"), width = 6, height = 4.25)

pcomb
```


Psuedobulk exp heatmap

```{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 3}
# feats <- c(
#   "EGFR", "MET", "ALK", "BRAF", "ERBB2", "ERBB3", "FGFR1", "FGFR2", "FGFR3", "KIT", "KRAS",
#   "ASCL1", "NEUROD1", "VIM", "IGF1R", "CDC42", "IGF1R", "ROS1", "PIK3CA", "NOTCH1", "MYC", "AKT1", "AXL", "YAP1"
# )
feats <- c("EGFR", "MET", "ALK", "BRAF", "ERBB2", "FGFR1", "KIT", "KRAS")
mapk_exp_df <- bulk_exp(srt_tum, cell_type_col = "is_tumor_cell", sample_id_col = "sample_id_new", meta_cols = c("time_point", "secondary_mapk"), features = feats)

mapk_exp_df <- mapk_exp_df %>%
  filter(time_point == "PD") %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(feats), ~ standardize(.x)))


mapk_exp_df_long <- mapk_exp_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = feats, names_to = "Gene", values_to = "exp")

p_df <- mapk_exp_df_long %>%
  group_by(Gene) %>%
  rstatix::wilcox_test(exp ~ secondary_mapk, detailed = T) %>%
  rstatix::adjust_pvalue(method = "BH") %>%
  rstatix::add_significance(
    p.col = "p", cutpoints = c(0, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 1),
    symbols = c("***", "**", "*", "^", "")
  )

p4_b <- p_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = "W", y = fct_relevel(Gene, rev(names(gene_ord))))) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = estimate)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = p.signif), vjust = 0.8) +
  theme_few() +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 3)) +
  theme(panel.border = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank()) +
  labs(fill = "W statistic", y = NULL, x = NULL) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = scales::muted("blue"), high = scales::muted("red"))

p4 <- mapk_exp_df_long %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(sample_id_new, samp_ord), y = as.numeric(fct_relevel(Gene, rev(names(gene_ord)))))) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = exp), color = "grey10") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "rocket") +
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(angle = 90),
    fill = guide_colorbar(keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 3)
  ) +
  # scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = c(0, 0), breaks = 1:n_distinct(mapk_exp_df_long$Gene),
    labels = rev(unique(mapk_exp_df_long$Gene)),
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~.,
      breaks = 1:n_distinct(mapk_exp_df_long$Gene),
      labels = rev(p_df$p.signif[match(feats, p_df$Gene)])
    )
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    strip.text.x = element_blank(), strip.background.x = element_blank(), panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y.right = element_blank(), axis.text.y.right = element_text(vjust = 0.8, hjust = 0)
  ) +
  facet_grid(. ~ secondary_mapk, scales = "free", space = "free") +
  labs(x = "Sample", y = "Gene", fill = "Normalized\nExpression")
p4
```


```{r}
# Without p value or ordering...
# p4 <- mapk_exp_df_long %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(sample_id_new, samp_ord), y = Gene)) +
#   geom_tile(aes(fill = exp), color = "grey10") +
#   scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "rocket") +
#   guides(
#     x = guide_axis(angle = 90),
#     fill = guide_colorbar(keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 3)
#   ) +
#   # scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0,0)) +
#   # scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0), breaks = 1:n_distinct(mapk_exp_df_long$Gene),
#   #                    labels = rev(unique(mapk_exp_df_long$Gene)),
#   #                    sec.axis = sec_axis(~.,
#   #                                        breaks = 1:n_distinct(mapk_exp_df_long$Gene),
#   #                                        labels = rev(p_df$p.signif[match(feats, p_df$Gene)]))) +
#   scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
#   theme_few() +
#   theme(
#     strip.text.x = element_blank(), strip.background.x = element_blank(), panel.border = element_blank(),
#     axis.ticks.y.right = element_blank(), axis.text.y.right = element_text(vjust = 0.8, hjust = 0)
#   ) +
#   facet_grid(. ~ secondary_mapk, scales = "free", space = "free") +
#   labs(x = "Sample", y = "Gene", fill = "Normalized\nExpression")
# p4
```


```{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 5.5}
pcomb <- (p1 + theme(plot.margin = margin())) + free(p2, type = "space", side = "b") + free((p3 + theme(plot.margin = margin(), axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), axis.title.x = element_blank())), type = "space") + plot_spacer() + free(p4, type = "space") + plot_spacer() + plot_layout(ncol = 2, widths = c(1, 0.1), heights = c(1, 1, 0.6)) +
  plot_annotation(theme = theme(plot.margin = margin(3, 8, 15, 12, unit = "mm")))
ggsave(pcomb, file = here("plots", "mapk_alt_luad_sig_relapsed_plusmuts_plusexp_v2.pdf"), width = 6, height = 5.5)

pcomb
```

Do a model with MAPKalt vs not for the three histologies, then a model for each mutation's association with LUSC and SCLC

```{r}
# library(lme4)
library(tidyr)
library(broom.mixed)

dat <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(time_point == "PD") %>%
  group_by(sample_id, secondary_mapk, time_point) %>%
  summarize(across(c(LUAD, LUSC, SCLC), mean))
dat$secondary_mapk <- factor(dat$secondary_mapk, levels = c("Unknown", "MAPKalt"))

mods <- map(c("LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC"), .f = function(pth) {
  mod <- lm(glue::glue("{pth} ~ secondary_mapk"), dat) %>%
    broom::tidy(conf.int = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(Signature = pth, .before = 1) %>%
    filter(term == "secondary_mapkMAPKalt")
}) %>%
  list_rbind()

mods <- mods %>%
  rstatix::add_significance(
    p.col = "p.value",
    cutpoints = c(0, 1e-04, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 1),
    symbols = c("p<0.0001", "p<0.001", "p<0.01", "p<0.05", "p<0.1", "ns")
  )
```


```{r, fig.width = 2, fig.height = 1.5}
p <- mods %>%
  ggplot(., aes(x = estimate, y = fct_reorder(Signature, estimate, mean))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(x = estimate, xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high), fatten = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "11") +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8)
  ) +
  labs(y = "Gene Signature", x = "Coefficient", title = "Secondary MAPK (PD)") +
  geom_text(data = {
    filter(mods, p.value != "ns")
  }, aes(y = Signature, x = estimate, label = p.value.signif), nudge_y = 0.325, size = 2.25)
ggsave(p, file = here("plots", "acquired_mapk_lm_v2.pdf"), width = 2, height = 1.5)
p
```


### Signature Heatmap

```{r}
feats <- c("LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC")
sig_exp_df <- bulk_exp(srt_tum, cell_type_col = "is_tumor_cell", sample_id_col = "sample_id_new", meta_cols = c("time_point", "secondary_mapk", "histology_predominant_short"), features = feats)

sig_exp_df <- sig_exp_df %>%
  # filter(time_point == "PD") %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(feats), ~ scale(.x)))


samp_ord2 <- fct_reorder(sig_exp_df$sample_id_new, -sig_exp_df$LUAD, median) %>%
  levels()

sig_exp_df_long <- sig_exp_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = feats, names_to = "Gene", values_to = "exp")

p0 <- sig_exp_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(sample_id_new, samp_ord2))) +
  geom_tile(aes(y = "MAPKalt", fill = secondary_mapk), show.legend = F, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("MAPKalt" = "black", "Unknown" = "white"), breaks = c("MAPKalt"),
    labels = c("Secondary MAPK"), na.value = "white"
  ) +
  facet_grid(. ~ time_point, scales = "free", space = "free") +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_few() +
  labs(y = NULL, x = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank())

p1 <- sig_exp_df_long %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(sample_id_new, samp_ord2), y = fct_relevel(Gene, "SCLC", "LUSC", "LUAD"))) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = exp), color = "black") +
  # scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "rocket", oob = scales::squish, limits = c(-2, 2)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = scales::muted("blue"), mid = "white", high = scales::muted("red"), oob = scales::squish, limits = c(-2, 2)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ time_point, scales = "free", space = "free") +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
```
