```{r}
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  labs(fill = "Normalized\nExpression", x = "Sample", y = "Lineage\nSignature") +
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(angle = 90),
    fill = guide_colorbar(keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 3)
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(strip.text.x = element_blank())
```


```{r, fig.width = 9, fig.height = 2}
pcomb <- p0 + free(p1, type = "label", side = "l") + plot_layout(ncol = 1, heights = c(0.1, 1)) & theme(plot.margin = margin())
pcomb
# ggsave(pcomb, file = here("plots", "sig_heatmap.pdf"), width = 9, height = 2)
```


#### Vertical

```{r, fig.width = 4.5, fig.height = 10}
library(ggpattern)

sig_exp_df$secondary_mapk[sig_exp_df$sample_id_new %in% db$metadata$sample_id_new[!db$metadata$has_impact]] <- NA
p0 <- sig_exp_df %>%
  mutate(secondary_mapk = ifelse(time_point %in% c("TN", "MRD"), "NA", secondary_mapk)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(sample_id_new, rev(samp_ord2)))) +
  geom_tile(aes(y = "MAPKalt", fill = secondary_mapk), show.legend = T, color = "black") +
  # geom_point(data = sig_exp_df[sig_exp_df$time_point != "PD", ], aes(y = "MAPKalt"), pch = 4, size = 5) +
  # geom_tile_pattern(aes(y = "MAPKalt", fill = "white", pattern = "stripe", color = "black"), show.legend = F) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Secondary MAPK\nAlteration",
    values = c("MAPKalt" = "black", "Unknown" = "white", "NA" = "grey60"), breaks = c("MAPKalt", "Unknown", "NA"),
    labels = c("Detected", "Undetected", "Not applicable")
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 0.5, order = 1)) +
  ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
  geom_tile(aes(y = "Clinical Histology", fill = histology_predominant_short), color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Clinical Histology", values = colors$histology_predominant_short,
    breaks = names(colors$histology_predominant_short)
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 0.5, order = 2)) +
  facet_grid(time_point ~ ., scales = "free", space = "free") +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c("MAPKalt", "Clinical Histology")) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90)) +
  theme_few() +
  labs(y = NULL, x = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    strip.text.y.right = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0)
  ) +
  coord_flip()

p1 <- sig_exp_df_long %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(sample_id_new, rev(samp_ord2)), y = fct_relevel(Gene, "LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC"))) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = exp), color = "black") +
  # scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "rocket", oob = scales::squish, limits = c(-2, 2)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = scales::muted("blue"), mid = "white", high = scales::muted("red"), oob = scales::squish, limits = c(-2, 2)) +
  facet_grid(time_point ~ ., scales = "free", space = "free") +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  labs(fill = "Normalized\nExpression", x = "Samples ranked by LUAD signature", y = "Lineage\nSignature") +
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(angle = 90),
    fill = guide_colorbar(keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 3)
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(strip.text.y = element_blank()) +
  coord_flip()


pcomb <- free((p1 + theme(plot.margin = margin(4, 0, 0, 30, "mm"))), type = "label", side = "b") + (p0 + theme(plot.margin = margin(4, 30, 0, 0, "mm"))) + plot_layout(ncol = 2, widths = c(1, 0.66), guides = "collect") + plot_annotation(theme = theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.box.margin = margin(), legend.margin = margin()))

# lgds <- ggpubr::get_legend(pcomb)
# lgd <- ggpubr::as_ggplot(lgds)


# ggsave(lgd, file = here("plots", "swimmers_anno_legend.pdf"), width = 14, height = 2)
pcomb
ggsave(pcomb, file = here("plots", "sig_heatmap_vertical.pdf"), width = 4.5, height = 10)
```


### Ternary diagram

```{r, fig.width = 5.4, fig.height = 3.4}
if (FALSE) {
  # df$time_point_col <- factor(df$time_point,
  #                             levels = levels(df$time_point),
  #                             labels = glue("<b style='color:{db$colors$time_point[levels(df$time_point)]}'>{levels(df$time_point)}</b>"))
  #
  # df$time_point_col <- factor(df$time_point, levels = levels(df$time_point),
  #                             labels = glue("<b style='color:{db$colors$time_point[levels(df$time_point)]}'>{levels(df$time_point)}</b>")

  sig_exp_df <- bulk_exp(srt_tum, cell_type_col = "is_tumor_cell", sample_id_col = "sample_id_new", meta_cols = c("time_point", "secondary_mapk"), features = c("LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC"))

  devtools::load_all()
  sig_exp_df <- sig_exp_df %>%
    # filter(time_point == "PD") %>%
    mutate(across(all_of(c("LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC")), ~ standardize(.x)))

  sig_exp_df$secondary_mapk[is.na(sig_exp_df$secondary_mapk)] <- "Unknown"
  # sig_exp_df$secondary_mapk[sig_exp_df$time == "Pre"] <- "N/A"

  library(ggtern)

  p1 <- sig_exp_df %>%
    mutate(acquired_mapk = ifelse(secondary_mapk == "MAPKalt", "MAPKalt", "Unknown")) %>%
    ggtern(aes(y = LUAD, x = LUSC, z = SCLC)) +
    geom_mask() +
    geom_point(aes(fill = time_point, shape = acquired_mapk), size = 3, show.legend = T) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 24)) +
    theme_classic() +
    Tlab("LUAD") + Llab("LUSC") + Rlab("SCLC") +
    theme_nolabels() +
    # theme_nomask() +
    guides(
      fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = 21)),
      shape = guide_legend(override.aes = list(fill = "black"))
    ) +
    labs(fill = "Timepoint", shape = "Acquired MAPK") +
    theme_noticks() +
    theme(panel.background = element_blank(), panel.border = element_blank()) +
    # facet_grid(.~time_point, switch = "x") +
    theme(
      # axis.title = element_markdown(color = "blue"), # This is where to do it
      strip.background = element_part_rect(side = ""),
      legend.position = "right",
      strip.text.x.bottom = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold")
    )
  ggsave(p1, file = here("plots", "sample_ternary_mapk.pdf"), width = 5.4, height = 3.4)
  p1
  detach("package:ggtern", unload = TRUE)
}
```

## Figure 5 -- Histotime

### Histotime violin (NEEDS UPDATE)

This is currently done in a different script

```{r}
srt_tum <- update_metadata(srt_tum, metadata = db$metadata, match_by = "sample_id")
```


```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=2.5}
histotime <- read.table(file = here("results", "histotime_cells.txt"), sep = "\t", header = T) %>%
  column_to_rownames("cell_id") %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    "sample_id" = "patient",
    "tp_old" = "time_point"
  )
srt_tum <- AddMetaData(srt_tum, histotime)

p_lineage_prop <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(!is.na(lineage_lean_05)) %>%
  add_count(sample_id, name = "n_samp") %>%
  add_count(sample_id, lineage_lean_20, name = "n_lean_20") %>%
  mutate(prop = n_lean_20 / n_samp) %>%
  # filter(n >= 20) %>%
  distinct(sample_id, time_point, lineage_lean_20, prop, n_lean_20, n_samp) %>%
  left_join(db$metadata) %>%
  complete(lineage_lean_20, nesting(sample_id, time_point, histology_predominant_short), fill = list(prop = 0)) %>%
  # filter(time_point != "On") %>%
  mutate(histology_predominant_short = fct_relevel(histology_predominant_short, "LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC", "Poorly Diff.")) %>%
  arrange((histology_predominant_short)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(time_point, "Pre", "On", "PD"), y = prop)) +
  see::geom_jitter2(aes(color = histology_predominant_short), alpha = 0.8) +
  # geom_pointrange(aes(group = time_point), fatten = 0.5,
  #   stat = "summary", color = "grey50",
  #   fun.min = function(z) {
  #     quantile(z, 0.25)
  #   },
  #   fun.max = function(z) {
  #     quantile(z, 0.75)
  #   },
  #   fun = median, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)
  # ) +
  facet_nested(. ~ lineage_lean_20, scales = "free", space = "free", switch = "x") +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors$histology_predominant_short) +
  # scale_fill_manual(values = colors$histology_predominant_short) +
  # theme_few() +
  ggpubr::geom_pwc(tip.length = 0, symnum.args = symnum.args, label = "p.adj.signif", p.adjust.method = "BH", label.size = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.25), expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.1))) +
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(cap = "both"),
    y = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  ) +
  labs(color = "Clinical Histology") +
  theme(
    strip.background.x = element_part_rect(side = "t", fill = NA), strip.placement = "outside",
    axis.title.y = element_text(hjust = 0.3)
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Proportion\nCommitted\n(>20%)")
p_lineage_prop
# ggsave(p_lineage_prop, file = here("plots", "lineage_prop_jitter.pdf"), width = 6, height = 2.5)
```


```{r}
m <- p_lineage_prop$data %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = "sample_id", names_from = lineage_lean_20, values_from = prop) %>%
  column_to_rownames("sample_id") %>%
  as.matrix()

scrna_histo <- apply(m, MARGIN = 1, FUN = function(x) {
  colnames(m)[which(x == max(x))]
}) %>%
  enframe(name = "sample_id", value = "scrna_histology") %>%
  left_join(db$metadata)

srt_tum$scrna_histo <- scrna_histo$scrna_histology[match(srt_tum$sample_id, scrna_histo$sample_id)]
```

```{r, fig.width = 9, fig.height = 2.75}
df <- FetchData(srt_tum, vars = c("PC_1", "PC_2", "lineage_probability", "lineage_probability2", "sample_id_new", "time_point", "Histotime")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lineage_probability2))
# df$histo_class <- fct_relevel(df$histo_class, names(colors$histo_cols))

p_linprob <- df %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(lineage_probability))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = PC_1, y = PC_2)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = lineage_probability2), size = 0.1) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "turbo")

# Of the possibly committed cells how much go each way in each sample
p_linprob_vln <- df %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(lineage_probability2))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(sample_id_new, (lineage_probability2), median), y = lineage_probability2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", alpha = 1) +
  geom_quasirandom(size = 0.01, bandwidth = 3, aes(color = lineage_probability2)) +
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(angle = 90),
    color = guide_colorbar(keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 3)
  ) +
  facet_grid(. ~ time_point, scales = "free", space = "free") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(-1, 0, 1), labels = c("LUSC", "LUAD", "SCLC")) +
  # scale_color_viridis_c(option = "turbo", breaks = c(-1, 1), labels = c("LUSC", "SCLC")) +
  # scale_color_gradient2(high = colors$histology_predominant_short[["SCLC"]], low = colors$histology_predominant_short[["LUSC"]], mid = colors$histology_predominant_short[["LUAD"]], breaks = c(-1, -0.5, 0, 0.5, 1), labels = c("LUSC", "", "LUAD", "", "SCLC")) +
  colorspace::scale_color_continuous_divergingx(palette = "roma", breaks = c(-1, -0.5, 0, 0.5, 1), labels = c("LUSC", "", "LUAD", "", "SCLC")) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 1, fill = NA, color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Sample ID", y = "Lineage\nCommitment", color = "Lineage")

p_linprob_vln <- ggrastr::rasterise(p_linprob_vln, layers = "Point", dpi = 300)
# ggsave(p_linprob_vln, file = here("plots", "lineage_prob_dotviolin.pdf"), width = 9, height = 3)
```



```{r, fig.width = 11, fig.height = 5}
tb_pad <- 0.25

samp_order <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(!is.na(lineage_probability2)) %>%
  mutate(sample_id_new = fct_reorder(sample_id_new, lineage_probability2, median)) %>%
  pull(sample_id_new) %>%
  levels()

p_anno <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(!is.na(lineage_probability2)) %>%
  distinct(sample_id_new) %>%
  left_join(db$metadata) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(sample_id_new, samp_order))) +
  # geom_tile(aes(y = "HistoClass (scRNA)", fill = histo_class), color = "black") +
  # scale_fill_manual(name = "HistoClass (scRNA)",
  #                   values = colors$histo_cols,
  #                   guide = guide_legend(order = 2, keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 0.5, ncol = 2, position = "bottom", title.position = "top")) +
  # new_scale_fill() +
  geom_tile(aes(y = "Clinical Histology", fill = histology_predominant_short), color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Clinical Histology", values = colors$histology_predominant_short,
    guide = guide_legend(order = 1, keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 0.5, ncol = 2, position = "bottom", title.position = "top")
  ) +
  new_scale_fill() +
  geom_tile(data = scrna_histo, aes(y = "scRNA Histology", fill = scrna_histology), color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "scRNA Histology", values = colors$histology_predominant_short,
    guide = guide_legend(order = 2, keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 0.5, ncol = 2, position = "bottom", title.position = "top")
  ) +
  new_scale_fill() +
  geom_tile(aes(y = "Tumor Stage", fill = stage_of_tissue_simple), color = "black") +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(
    name = "Tumor Stage",
    guide = guide_legend(order = 3, keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 0.5, ncol = 3, position = "bottom", title.position = "top")
  ) +
  new_scale_fill() +
  geom_tile(aes(y = "Tissue Site", fill = site_of_tissue_simple), color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = colors$site_of_tissue_simple,
    guide = guide_legend(order = 4, keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 0.5, ncol = 3, position = "bottom", title.position = "top")
  ) +
  facet_grid(. ~ fct_relevel(time_point, names(colors$time_point)), scales = "free", space = "free") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(), panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  # guides(fill = guide_legend(keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 0.5, ncol = 2)) +
  theme(strip.text = element_blank(), legend.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8)) +
  labs(fill = "Tissue Site", y = NULL) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(c(
    "Clinical Histology",
    "scRNA Histology",
    "Tumor Stage",
    "Tissue Site"
  )))

p_prop05 <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(!is.na(lineage_probability2)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(sample_id_new, samp_order))) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill = lineage_lean_05), position = "fill") +
  facet_grid(. ~ fct_relevel(time_point, "Pre", "On", "PD"), scales = "free", space = "free") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$histology_predominant_short) +
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(angle = 90),
    y = guide_axis(cap = "both"),
    fill = guide_legend(keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 0.4)
  ) +
  labs(y = "Proportion\nLeaning\n(>5%)", x = NULL, fill = "Lineage") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1))

p_prop20 <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(!is.na(lineage_probability2)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(sample_id_new, samp_order))) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill = lineage_lean_20), position = "fill") +
  facet_grid(. ~ fct_relevel(time_point, "Pre", "On", "PD"), scales = "free", space = "free") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$histology_predominant_short) +
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(angle = 90),
    y = guide_axis(cap = "both"),
    fill = guide_legend(keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 0.4)
  ) +
  labs(y = "Proportion\nCommitted\n(>20%)", x = NULL, fill = "Lineage")

p_prop <- free(p_prop05, type = "label", side = "l") + free(p_prop20, type = "label", side = "l") + plot_layout(ncol = 1, guides = "collect") &
  theme(
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, size = 8),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8)
  ) &
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1))


pcomb <- free((p_linprob_vln + labs(x = NULL) + theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), plot.margin = margin(t = tb_pad, b = 0, unit = "lines"))), type = "label", side = "l") + free((p_prop + theme(plot.margin = margin())), type = "label", side = "l") + (p_anno + labs(x = "Sample ID") + theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 0, b = tb_pad, unit = "lines")) + guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90))) + plot_layout(ncol = 1, heights = c(1, 0.8, 0.4))
pcomb

# ggsave(pcomb, file = here("plots", "lineage_prob_dotviolin_anno_v2.pdf"), width = 11, height = 5)
```





# Other/Unorganized

### Old MAPK

```{r}
srt_tum$secondary_mapk <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  mutate(secondary_mapk = case_when(
    (sample_id %in% secondary_mapks) & (sample_id %in% inferCNV_amp_samples) ~ "impact+infercnv",
    sample_id %in% secondary_mapks ~ "impact",
    sample_id %in% inferCNV_amp_samples ~ "infercnv",
    # Somehow missing Hpost23 and Hpost 27 which have secondary MAPK
    # Probably due to 'activity score' filtering
    sample_id %in% c("Hpost23", "Hpost27") ~ "manual",
    # !is.na(impact_for_sample_clean) ~ F, C
    .default = "none"
  )) %>%
  pull(secondary_mapk)

srt_tum$secondary_mapk_binned <- factor(ifelse(srt_tum$secondary_mapk != "none", "MAPKalt", "Unknown"))



p1 <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(time_point == "Progression") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(sample_id, LUAD, median), y = LUAD)) +
  geom_violin(scale = "width", aes(fill = time_point), show.legend = F) +
  geom_pointrange(
    stat = "summary", fatten = 0.1,
    fun.min = function(z) {
      quantile(z, 0.25)
    },
    fun.max = function(z) {
      quantile(z, 0.75)
    },
    fun = median, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)
  ) +
  facet_grid(. ~ secondary_mapk_binned, scales = "free", space = "free") +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90)) +
  labs(x = "Sample", y = "LUAD signature score") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
    strip.background.x = element_blank()
  )

p2 <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(time_point == "PD") %>%
  group_by(sample_id, secondary_mapk_binned, time_point) %>%
  summarize(LUAD = mean(LUAD)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = secondary_mapk_binned, y = LUAD)) +
  geom_boxplot(outliers = F, aes(fill = time_point), show.legend = F) +
  geom_quasirandom(size = 0.3, pch = 1) +
  ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox", size = 4, label = "p.signif", comparisons = list(levels(srt_tum$secondary_mapk_binned)), tip.length = 0, vjust = 0.4) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "LUAD signature score\n(per sample means)") +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

pcomb <- p1 + p2 + plot_layout(nrow = 1, widths = c(1, 0.1), guides = "collect") & theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6))
# ggsave(pcomb, file = here("plots", "mapk_alt_luad_sig_relapsed.pdf"), width = 5, height = 2.5)
pcomb
```



#### MAPK sustained vs LUAD

Get inferCNV measures

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height =5}
# qplot(srt_tum$EGFR_cnv)
# qplot(srt_tum$MET_cnv)
amp_thresh <- 1.05

cnv_df <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  group_by(sample_id_new) %>%
  summarize(across(ends_with("_cnv"), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = T)))


cnv_mat <- cnv_df %>%
  column_to_rownames("sample_id_new") %>%
  as.matrix() %>%
  t()

cnv_mat_binary <- cnv_mat

cnv_mat_binary[cnv_mat_binary > amp_thresh] <- 1
cnv_mat_binary[cnv_mat_binary < 0.95] <- -1
cnv_mat_binary[!cnv_mat_binary %in% c(-1, 1)] <- 0

Heatmap(cnv_mat, col = scatools::logr_col_fun(breaks = c(0.95, 1, 1.05)))

Heatmap(cnv_mat_binary, cluster_columns = F)
```


```{r}
cnv_df_long <- cnv_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = !sample_id_new, values_to = "inferCNV", names_to = "Gene")


cnv_df_long$inferCNV_amp <- cnv_df_long$inferCNV > amp_thresh
cnv_df_long$inferCNV_amp_conf <- ifelse(cnv_df_long$inferCNV > 1.1, "high", "low")

cnv_df_long <- filter(cnv_df_long, inferCNV_amp)

inferCNV_amp_samples <- filter(cnv_df_long, inferCNV_amp, grepl("EGFR|MET", Gene)) %>%
  pull(sample_id_new) %>%
  unique()
```


```{r}
srt_tum$egfr_2nd <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  mutate(egfr_2nd = case_when(
    !is.na(EGFR_Secondary) ~ T,
    !is.na(dmp_sample) ~ F,
    .default = NA
  )) %>%
  pull(egfr_2nd)

srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(time_point == "PD") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(sample_id, LUAD, median), y = LUAD)) +
  geom_violin(scale = "width") +
  geom_pointrange(
    stat = "summary",
    fun.min = function(z) {
      quantile(z, 0.25)
    },
    fun.max = function(z) {
      quantile(z, 0.75)
    },
    fun = median, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)
  ) +
  facet_grid(. ~ egfr_2nd, scales = "free", space = "free") +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90))
```


```{r}
# df <- FetchData(srt_tum, vars = c("sample_id", "time_point", "secondary_egfr_genomic", "egfr_2nd", "EGFR"))
#
# df %>%
#   filter(!is.na(egfr_2nd), time_point == "Progression") %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(sample_id, EGFR, median), y = EGFR)) +
#   geom_violin(aes(fill = egfr_2nd), scale = "width") +
#   guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90)) +
#   facet_grid(. ~ secondary_egfr_genomic, scales = "free", space = "free")
```


Can we systematically plot all secondarily altered genes for each sample?

```{r}
mapk_hits <- read.table(file = here("results", "mapk_hits_table.txt"), header = T, sep = "\t")
egfr_hits$gene <- "EGFR"

all_hits <- db$metadata

# Need a binarized matrix of each progressed samples mutations in the metadata
meta_muts <- db$metadata %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(dmp_sample),
    time_point == "PD",
    sample_id %in% unique(srt_tum$sample_id)
  )
meta_muts$egfr_mut <- !is.na(meta_muts$EGFR)

# Get a list of all other genes and bootstrap a binary matrix
others <- str_split(db$metadata$MAPKalt, pattern = ", ", simplify = T) %>%
  str_split(., pattern = ": ", simplify = T)
other_genes <- others[, 1] %>% unique()
other_genes <- other_genes[other_genes != "" & !is.na(other_genes)]

mut_mat <- matrix(data = 0, nrow = nrow(meta_muts), ncol = length(other_genes) + 1, dimnames = list(meta_muts$sample_id, c(other_genes, "EGFR")))

# For the other mutations need to parse out
for (i in 1:nrow(meta_muts)) {
  sample_id <- as.character(meta_muts$sample_id[i])

  mut <- meta_muts[i, "MAPKalt", drop = T]

  egfr_mut <- meta_muts[i, "egfr_mut", drop = T]

  if (!is.na(mut)) {
    muts <- str_split(mut, pattern = "; ", simplify = F)[[1]]
    spl <- str_split(muts, pattern = ": ", simplify = T)

    genes <- spl[, 1]
    mut_types <- spl[, 2]

    mut_mat[sample_id, genes] <- mut_types
  }

  if (egfr_mut) {
    mut_mat[sample_id, "EGFR"] <- as.character(meta_muts[i, "secondary_egfr_genomic", drop = T])
  }
}



# Remove any non mutant samples and non mutant genes
mut_mat <- mut_mat[!apply(mut_mat, 1, FUN = function(x) all(x == 0)), !apply(mut_mat, 2, FUN = function(x) all(x == 0))]
# Now loop over and plot each genes expression against the background of non mutant samples (only in progressed patients)

mut_exp_df <- map(1:nrow(mut_mat), .f = function(i) {
  samp <- rownames(mut_mat)[i]

  genes <- names(which(mut_mat[samp, ] != 0))

  wt_samps <- map(genes, .f = function(gene) {
    names(which(mut_mat[, gene] == 0))
  })
  names(wt_samps) <- genes

  df <- FetchData(srt_tum, vars = c("sample_id", "time_point", genes)) %>%
    filter(sample_id %in% rownames(mut_mat))


  dfs <- map(genes, .f = function(gene) {
    mut_type <- mut_mat[samp, gene]

    df_pl <- df %>%
      filter(sample_id %in% c(samp, wt_samps[[gene]])) %>%
      mutate(sample_plot = samp, Gene = gene) %>%
      mutate(mut_wt = ifelse(sample_id == sample_plot, mut_type, "wt")) %>%
      dplyr::rename("Expression" = .data[[gene]]) %>%
      select(all_of(c("sample_id", "sample_plot", "time_point", "Gene", "mut_wt", "Expression")))
  }) %>% list_rbind()
}) %>%
  list_rbind()
```

```{r}
pls <- map(unique(mut_exp_df$sample_plot), .f = function(samp) {
  mut_exp_df %>%
    filter(sample_plot == samp) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = mut_wt, y = Expression)) +
    geom_violin(scale = "width") +
    geom_pointrange(
      stat = "summary",
      fun.min = function(z) {
        quantile(z, 0.25)
      },
      fun.max = function(z) {
        quantile(z, 0.75)
      },
      fun = median
    ) +
    facet_grid(sample_plot ~ Gene, scales = "free", space = "free")
})

names(pls) <- unique(mut_exp_df$sample_plot)
```

Or as single plot

```{r, fig.width = 30, fig.height=3}
pl <- ggplot(mut_exp_df, aes(x = mut_wt, y = Expression)) +
  geom_violin(scale = "width") +
  geom_pointrange(
    stat = "summary",
    fun.min = function(z) {
      quantile(z, 0.25)
    },
    fun.max = function(z) {
      quantile(z, 0.75)
    },
    fun = median
  ) +
  facet_nested(. ~ sample_plot + Gene, scales = "free", space = "free") +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90))
pl
```

Get log2fc for each mut wt pair

```{r}
comps <- mut_exp_df %>%
  distinct(sample_plot, Gene)

df_log2fc <- map(1:nrow(comps), .f = function(i) {
  df <- mut_exp_df %>%
    filter(
      sample_plot == comps[i, "sample_plot"],
      Gene == comps[i, "Gene"]
    )

  x <- log2(df[df$mut_wt != "wt", "Expression"] + 1)
  y <- log2(df[df$mut_wt == "wt", "Expression"] + 1)

  log2fc <- mean(x) - mean(y)
  p_val <- wilcox.test(x, y, correct = F)

  res <- broom::tidy(p_val)
  res$log2fc <- log2fc

  if (res$p.value == 0) {
    res$p.value <- .Machine$double.xmin
  }

  res$sample_plot <- comps[i, "sample_plot"]

  res$Gene <- comps[i, "Gene"]

  return(res)
}) %>%
  list_rbind()

df_log2fc$p_adj <- p.adjust(df_log2fc$p.value, method = "bonf")

log2fc_thresh <- 0.25

df_log2fc <- mut_exp_df %>%
  filter(mut_wt != "wt") %>%
  distinct(sample_plot, Gene, mut_wt) %>%
  right_join(df_log2fc) %>%
  rstatix::add_significance(
    p.col = "p_adj",
    cutpoints = c(0, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 1),
    symbols = c("***", "**", "*", "")
  ) %>%
  mutate(p_adj.signif = ifelse(abs(log2fc) < log2fc_thresh, "", p_adj.signif)) %>%
  mutate(RNA_expression = case_when(
    log2fc > 0 & p_adj.signif != "" ~ "Overexpressed",
    log2fc < 0 & p_adj.signif != "" ~ "Underexpressed",
    .default = "ns"
  ))
```



```{r, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 4}
df_log2fc %>%
  mutate(sig_y = ifelse(log2fc > 0, log2fc, log2fc - 0.1)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = mut_wt, y = log2fc)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = log2fc)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = scales::muted("blue"), mid = "grey", high = scales::muted("red")) +
  geom_text(aes(label = p_adj.signif, y = sig_y), size = 3) +
  facet_nested(. ~ sample_plot + Gene, scales = "free", space = "free") +
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(angle = 90),
    fill = "none"
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  # geom_hline(yintercept = c(-log2fc_thresh, log2fc_thresh), linetype = "dotted") +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    strip.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0, size = 7), strip.clip = "off", strip.background.x = element_part_rect(side = "b"),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines")
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Log2FC versus wildtype")
```


Nominate samples with active secondary mutations

```{r}
df_log2fc %>%
  filter(p_adj.signif != "") %>%
  pull(sample_plot) %>%
  unique() -> secondary_mapks

df_log2fc %>%
  filter(p_adj.signif != "" | sample_plot %in% c("Hpost23", "Hpost27")) %>%
  select(sample_id = sample_plot, Gene, mutation = mut_wt)
```


```{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 3}
srt_tum$secondary_mapk <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  mutate(secondary_mapk = case_when(
    (sample_id %in% secondary_mapks) & (sample_id %in% inferCNV_amp_samples) ~ "impact+infercnv",
    sample_id %in% secondary_mapks ~ "impact",
    sample_id %in% inferCNV_amp_samples ~ "infercnv",
    # Somehow missing Hpost23 and Hpost 27 which have secondary MAPK
    # Probably due to 'activity score' filtering
    sample_id %in% c("Hpost23", "Hpost27") ~ "manual",
    # !is.na(impact_for_sample_clean) ~ F, C
    .default = "none"
  )) %>%
  pull(secondary_mapk)

srt_tum$secondary_mapk_binned <- factor(ifelse(srt_tum$secondary_mapk != "none", "MAPKalt", "Unknown"))



p1 <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(time_point == "Progression") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(sample_id, LUAD, median), y = LUAD)) +
  geom_violin(scale = "width", aes(fill = time_point), show.legend = F) +
  geom_pointrange(
    stat = "summary", fatten = 0.1,
    fun.min = function(z) {
      quantile(z, 0.25)
    },
    fun.max = function(z) {
      quantile(z, 0.75)
    },
    fun = median, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)
  ) +
  facet_grid(. ~ secondary_mapk_binned, scales = "free", space = "free") +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90)) +
  labs(x = "Sample", y = "LUAD signature score") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
    strip.background.x = element_blank()
  )

p2 <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(time_point == "Progression") %>%
  group_by(sample_id, secondary_mapk_binned, time_point) %>%
  summarize(LUAD = mean(LUAD)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = secondary_mapk_binned, y = LUAD)) +
  geom_boxplot(outliers = F, aes(fill = time_point), show.legend = F) +
  geom_quasirandom(size = 0.3, pch = 1) +
  ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox", size = 4, label = "p.signif", comparisons = list(levels(srt_tum$secondary_mapk_binned)), tip.length = 0, vjust = 0.4) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = db$colors$time_point) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "LUAD signature score\n(per sample means)") +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

pcomb <- p1 + p2 + plot_layout(nrow = 1, widths = c(1, 0.1), guides = "collect") & theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6))
ggsave(pcomb, file = here("plots", "mapk_alt_luad_sig_relapsed.pdf"), width = 5, height = 2.5)
pcomb
```

Need better...Heatmap depicting the relevant mutations (that are active) alongside CNV alongside LUAD scores?





## MoR Pie chart

```{r}
df_resist <- db$metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(time_point == "PD") %>%
  select(sample_id, mor_classification, EGFR_De.novo, EGFR_Acquired, histology_predominant) %>%
  mutate(
    on_target = !is.na(EGFR_Acquired),
    # mapk = !is.na(secondary_other_mapk_genomic),
    histo = ifelse(histology_predominant == "Lung Adenocarcinoma", F, histology_predominant)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c("on_target", "mapk", "histo"), values_to = "value", names_to = "type")
df_resist$value[df_resist$value] <- df_resist$type[df_resist$value]


df_resist %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = sample_id, y = type)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = value), color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("mapk" = "orange", "histo" = "maroon", "on_target" = "blue"), na.value = "white") +
  coord_radial(inner.radius = 0.5, r_axis_inside = T, start = -0.5 * pi, end = 0.5 * pi) +
  guides(
    theta = guide_axis_theta(angle = 90),
    r = guide_axis(angle = 0)
  ) +
  theme(axis.line = element_blank()) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL)
```

Summarize overall frequencies of each

```{r, fig.width = 1.25, fig.height = 3}
df_resist_summary <- df_resist %>%
  filter(time_point == "Progression") %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = sample_id, names_from = type, values_from = value) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()
df_resist_summary$unknown <- as.character(apply(df_resist_summary[, 2:4] != F, 1, sum) == 0)

df_resist_summary_long <- df_resist_summary %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = on_target:unknown, names_to = "Category", values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(Value = ifelse(Value %in% c("TRUE", "FALSE"), Value, TRUE)) %>%
  filter(Value == TRUE) %>%
  mutate(Category = str_to_title(gsub("_", " ", Category))) %>%
  mutate(Category = ifelse(Category == "Mapk Sustained", "MAPK Sustained", Category)) %>%
  add_count(Category) %>%
  mutate(Proportion = n / nrow(df_resist_summary)) %>%
  distinct(Category, Proportion, n)

dadd <- data.frame("Category" = "Any Mechanism", "Proportion" = 1 - df_resist_summary_long$Proportion[df_resist_summary_long$Category == "Unknown"])

df_resist_summary_long <- bind_rows(df_resist_summary_long, dadd)

p <- df_resist_summary_long %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(Category, -Proportion, mean), y = Proportion)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = Category)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("MAPK Sustained" = "orange", "Histological Transformation" = "maroon", "On Target" = "blue", "Unknown" = "grey50")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.2)) +
  guides(
    x = guide_axis(angle = 65, cap = "none"),
    y = guide_axis(cap = "upper")
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(x = NULL)
p
```




Or maybe the EGFR primary vs denovo should be added onto the impact plot

```{r, fig.width=9, fig.height = 4}
df_resist <- db$metadata %>%
  select(sample_id, mech_of_resistance_classification, secondary_egfr_genomic, secondary_other_mapk_genomic, histological_transformation_clinical, histological_transformation_clinical_simple, time_point) %>%
  mutate(
    On_Target = !is.na(secondary_egfr_genomic),
    MAPK_Sustained = !is.na(secondary_other_mapk_genomic),
    Histological_Transformation = ifelse(is.na(histological_transformation_clinical_simple), F, histological_transformation_clinical_simple)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c("On_Target", "MAPK_Sustained", "Histological_Transformation"), values_to = "value", names_to = "type") %>%
  mutate(type = gsub("_", " ", type))
df_resist$value[df_resist$time_point == "Pre"] <- FALSE # Patch over pre treatments
df_resist$value[df_resist$value] <- df_resist$type[df_resist$value]

# Harmonize with EGFR table
egfr_hits_meta$category <- "EGFR_muts"
egfr_hits_meta$subcategory <- egfr_hits_meta$type
egfr_hits_meta$feature <- egfr_hits_meta$egfr_cat
df_resist$category <- "Resistance"
df_resist$subcategory <- df_resist$type
df_resist$feature <- df_resist$value

cols_bind <- c("sample_id", "category", "subcategory", "feature", "time_point")

df_merged <- rbind(egfr_hits_meta[, cols_bind], df_resist[, cols_bind]) %>%
  mutate(type_name = paste(category, subcategory, feature, sep = "_"))

egfr_comb_mat <- df_merged %>%
  filter(feature != F, category == "EGFR_muts") %>%
  mutate(value = 1) %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c("sample_id"), names_from = c("category", "subcategory", "feature"), values_from = value, values_fill = 0, values_fn = sum) %>%
  column_to_rownames("sample_id") %>%
  t() %>%
  memoSort()

p1 <- df_merged %>%
  filter(category == "EGFR_muts") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(sample_id, colnames(egfr_comb_mat)), y = fct_rev(fct_relevel(type_name, rownames(egfr_comb_mat))))) +
  geom_tile() +
  facet_nested(subcategory ~ time_point, space = "free", scales = "free", switch = "y") +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = rownames(egfr_comb_mat), labels = gsub("EGFR_muts_De novo_|EGFR_muts_Secondary_", "", rownames(egfr_comb_mat))) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90)) +
  labs(x = "Sample ID", y = "EGFR Variant") +
  theme_pander(base_size = 10) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"), strip.clip = "off", strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0.5, size = 8), strip.placement = "outside", axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6), panel.grid = element_line(linetype = "22", linewidth = 0.25, color = "grey85"), axis.line = element_blank(), strip.background.y = element_part_rect(side = "r", color = "black", fill = NA))

p1_bar <- df_merged %>%
  filter(category == "EGFR_muts") %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = fct_rev(fct_relevel(type_name, rownames(egfr_comb_mat))))) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill = time_point)) +
  scale_y_discrete(breaks = rownames(egfr_comb_mat), labels = gsub("De novo_|Secondary_", "", rownames(egfr_comb_mat))) +
  scale_x_continuous(position = "top") +
  facet_grid(subcategory ~ ., space = "free", scales = "free", switch = "y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors$time_point) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 0.4, position = "inside"),
    x = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(unit = "lines"), strip.text = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(), axis.line.y = element_blank(), legend.position.inside = c(1.1, 0.5), legend.background = element_blank()) +
  labs(x = "Count", y = NULL, fill = "Timepoint")

p2 <- df_merged %>%
  filter(category == "Resistance") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(sample_id, colnames(egfr_comb_mat)), y = subcategory)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = feature)) +
  facet_nested(. ~ time_point, space = "free", scales = "free_x", switch = "y") +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90)) +
  labs(x = "Sample ID", y = NULL, fill = "Resistance Mechanism") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("MAPK Sustained" = "orange", "Histological Transformation" = "maroon", "On Target" = "blue"), na.value = "white") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 0.4)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"), strip.clip = "off", strip.text = element_blank(), strip.background = element_blank(), strip.placement = "outside", axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6), panel.grid = element_line(linetype = "22", linewidth = 0.25, color = "grey85"), strip.background.y = element_part_rect(side = "r", color = "black", fill = NA))

p2_bar <- df_merged %>%
  filter(category == "Resistance", feature != F) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = subcategory)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill = subcategory)) +
  scale_y_discrete(breaks = rownames(egfr_comb_mat), labels = gsub("De novo_|Secondary_", "", rownames(egfr_comb_mat))) +
  scale_x_continuous(position = "bottom") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("MAPK Sustained" = "orange", "Histological Transformation" = "maroon", "On Target" = "blue")) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(keywidth = 0.4, keyheight = 0.4, position = "inside"),
    x = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(unit = "lines"), strip.text = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(), axis.line.y = element_blank(), legend.position.inside = c(1.1, 0.5), legend.background = element_blank(), legend.position = "none") +
  labs(x = "Count", y = NULL, fill = "Timepoint")

# Final adjustments
p1 <- (p1 + theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), axis.title.x = element_blank(), plot.margin = margin()))
p1_bar <- p1_bar + theme(plot.margin = margin(r = 2.5, unit = "lines"))
p2 <- (p2 + theme(strip.background = element_blank(), strip.text = element_blank(), axis.line = element_blank(), legend.position = "none", plot.margin = margin()))

# Combined
pfinal <- p1 + p1_bar + p2 + p2_bar + plot_layout(ncol = 2, heights = c(1, 0.25), widths = c(1, 0.125)) & theme(panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"))
pfinal

ggsave(pfinal, file = here("plots", "egfr_mut_plot_plus_resist.pdf"), width = 9, height = 4)
```


```{r, fig.width=9, fig.height = 6}
df_merged %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(sample_id, colnames(egfr_comb_mat)), y = fct_rev(fct_relevel(type_name, rownames(egfr_comb_mat))))) +
  geom_tile() +
  facet_nested(category + subcategory ~ time_point, space = "free", scales = "free", switch = "y") +
  # scale_y_discrete(breaks = rownames(egfr_comb_mat), labels = gsub("De novo_|Secondary_", "", rownames(egfr_comb_mat))) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90)) +
  labs(x = "Sample ID", y = "EGFR Variant") +
  theme_pander(base_size = 10) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"), strip.clip = "off", strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0.5, size = 8), strip.placement = "outside", axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6), panel.grid = element_line(linetype = "22", linewidth = 0.25, color = "grey85"), strip.background.y = element_part_rect(side = "r", color = "black", fill = NA))
```


## Secondary MAPK mutation breakdown

```{r}
second_mapk_summary <- db$metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(time_point == "Progression") %>%
  separate_rows("secondary_other_mapk_genomic", sep = "; ") %>%
  separate(secondary_other_mapk_genomic, into = c("Gene", "Alteration"), sep = ": ") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Gene)) %>%
  select(sample_id, Gene, Alteration) %>%
  add_count(Gene) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))

second_mapk_summary
```
















Tumor plus normal cells

## UMAP

```{r, fig.width = 4, fig.height = 3}
p1 <- DimPlot(srt_epi, reduction = "umap", cols = db$colors$epi_type, group.by = "epi_type", order = T, label = F, label.size = 3, label.box = F) +
  # coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  labs(x = "UMAP1", y = "UMAP2", title = "Epithelial Clusters") +
  theme(
    aspect.ratio = 1,
    axis.line = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black")
  )
ggsave(p1, file = here("plots", "epithelial_types_umap.pdf"), width = 4, height = 3)
p1
```

## Epithelial type markers

```{r, fig.width = 8, fig.height = 2.4}
srt_epi$epi_type_col <- factor(srt_epi$epi_type, levels = levels(srt_epi$epi_type), labels = glue("<b style='color:{db$colors$epi_type[levels(srt_epi$epi_type)]}'>{levels(srt_epi$epi_type)}</b>"))
srt_epi$epi_type_col <- fct_rev(srt_epi$epi_type_col)

pl <- DotPlot(srt_epi, features = markers$epi_markers, group.by = "epi_type_col", dot.scale = 4)

pl <- pl +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "mm"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
    strip.background.x = element_part_rect(side = ""),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA),
    strip.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    strip.clip = "off",
    axis.line = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x.bottom = element_text(size = 8)
  ) +
  scale_color_gradient2(low = scales::muted("blue"), high = scales::muted("red")) +
  theme(
    legend.key.width = unit(0.5, "lines"), legend.key.height = unit(0.6, "lines"),
    axis.text.y = element_markdown(),
    panel.spacing = unit(0.1, "lines")
  ) +
  labs(y = "Epithelial Cluster", x = "Marker Genes")
ggsave(pl, file = here("plots", "epithelial_marker_dotplot.pdf"), width = 8, height = 2.4)
pl
```

### Cytotrace over clusters

```{r}
srt_epi <- AddMetaData(srt_epi, cyto)

srt_epi@meta.data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(as.factor(epi_clusters), ct_pseudotime, median), y = ct_pseudotime)) +
  geom_boxplot()
```



## Histological transformation

Setup psuedobulked object per patient

```{r}
counts <- as.matrix(srt_tum@meta.data[, pathways$pathway])

sce <- SingleCellExperiment(list(counts = t(counts)), colData = srt_tum@meta.data[, !colnames(srt_tum@meta.data) %in% names(pathways)])

sce_bulk <- scuttle::aggregateAcrossCells(sce, ids = sce$sample_id, statistics = "mean")
assay(sce_bulk, "scaled") <- t(scale(t(assay(sce_bulk))))

geneset_anno_df <- pathways %>%
  column_to_rownames("pathway") %>%
  select(genesets_related_to)

# sce_bulk$time_point <- factor(sce_bulk$time_point, levels = c("Pre", "On", "Progression"))

# rownames(sce_bulk)[rownames(sce_bulk) == "SCLC_CCLE"] <- "SCLC"
# rownames(sce_bulk)[rownames(sce_bulk) == "LUAD_GIRARD"] <- "LUAD"
# rownames(sce_bulk)[rownames(sce_bulk) == "LUSC_GIRARD"] <- "LUSC"


# egfr_cnv_means <- egfr_exp_df %>%
#   group_by(sample_id) %>%
#   summarize(EGFR_cnv = mean(EGFR_cnv)) %>%
#   column_to_rownames("sample_id")
#
# egfr_means <- egfr_exp_df %>%
#   group_by(sample_id) %>%
#   summarize(EGFR = mean(EGFR)) %>%
#   column_to_rownames("sample_id")
#
# met_cnv_means <- egfr_exp_df %>%
#   group_by(sample_id) %>%
#   summarize(MET_cnv = mean(MET_cnv)) %>%
#   column_to_rownames("sample_id")
#
# met_means <- egfr_exp_df %>%
#   group_by(sample_id) %>%
#   summarize(MET = mean(MET)) %>%
#   column_to_rownames("sample_id")
#
#
# sce_bulk$EGFR_cnv <- egfr_cnv_means[colnames(sce_bulk),]
# sce_bulk$MET_cnv <- met_cnv_means[colnames(sce_bulk),]
# sce_bulk$EGFR <- egfr_means[colnames(sce_bulk),]
# sce_bulk$MET <- met_means[colnames(sce_bulk),]
```


```{r, fig.width=9, fig.height=2}
# Scale across rows and then columns

# top_anno_df <- colData(sce_bulk) %>%
#   as.data.frame() %>%
#   select(sample_id, time_point, secondary_mapk_binned)
#

mat <- assay(sce_bulk, "scaled")[c("LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC"), ]

mat <- mat[, order(-mat["LUAD", ])]

top_anno <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  timepoint = anno_block(
    gp = gpar(fill = db$colors$time_point),
    labels = c("Pre-treatment", "On", "Progression"),
    labels_gp = gpar(col = "white", fontsize = 11)
  ),
  "Acquired MAPK" = sce_bulk[, colnames(mat)]$secondary_mapk_binned,
  # "Histological Transformation\n(Pathology)" = sce_bulk$histological_transformation_clinical,
  col = list(
    "Acquired MAPK" = c("MAPKalt" = db$colors$tf[[1]], "Unknown" = db$colors$tf[[2]])
  ),
  annotation_legend_param = list(
    "Acquired MAPK" = list(direction = "horizontal", nrow = 1)
  ),
  show_legend = c(T, F)
)

ht <- Heatmap(
  matrix = mat,
  name = "Signature Score",
  col = scatools::logr_col_fun(),
  column_split = sce_bulk[, colnames(mat)]$time_point,
  cluster_column_slices = F,
  cluster_columns = F,
  column_title = NULL,
  cluster_rows = F,
  top_annotation = top_anno,
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    legend_direction = "vertical",
    nrow = 1,
    legend_width = unit(3, "cm")
  ),
  column_names_gp = gpar(cex = 0.6),
  row_names_gp = gpar(cex = 0.8)
)
pdf(here("plots", "signature_heatmap.pdf"), width = 9, height = 1.75)
draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right", annotation_legend_side = "bottom")
dev.off()
draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right", annotation_legend_side = "bottom")
```


```{r, fig.width = 3.5, fig.height=2}
p <- histo_frac_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = ends_with("pos_frac"), names_to = "Signature", values_to = "Proportion") %>%
  mutate(Signature = gsub("_pos_frac", "", Signature)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = time_point, y = Proportion)) +
  # geom_violin() +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = time_point), color = "black", width = 0.8, outlier.size = 0.5, outliers = T) +
  # geom_quasirandom(size = 0.5, pch = 1, aes(fill = time_point), color = "black", stroke = 0.5, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(0.25, 0.75), linetype = "dotted") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = db$colors$time_point) +
  labs(y = "Proportion\nSignature positive", x = "Signature", fill = "Timepoint") +
  ggpubr::stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("Pre", "On"), c("Pre", "Progression"), c("On", "Progression")), method = "wilcox", label = "p.signif", tip.length = 0, step.increase = 0.1, vjust = 0, size = 2) +
  facet_grid(. ~ Signature, switch = "x") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.25), expand = c(0.08, 0)) +
  coord_capped_cart(left = "both") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    strip.text.x = element_markdown(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size = 8),
    strip.background.x = element_part_rect(side = "t", linewidth = 0.5),
    strip.placement = "inside",
    strip.clip = "off",
    axis.line.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(keywidth = 0.8, keyheight = 0.8),
  )
ggsave(p, file = here("plots", "histo_postivity_boxplots.pdf"), width = 3.5, height = 2)
p
```

### Ternary plots

Grab the three best LUAD LUSC and SCLC pathways, scale from 0-1 each and create a ternary plot for the samples

```{r, fig.width = 11, fig.height=5}
range01 <- function(x, ...) {
  (x - min(x, ...)) / (max(x, ...) - min(x, ...))
}

paths <- c("LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC")

colData(sce_bulk)[, paths] <- NULL


df <- scater::makePerCellDF(sce_bulk, features = paths, assay.type = "counts", use.coldata = T)

scaled_paths <- map(paths, \(p) {
  range01(df[[p]], na.rm = T)
}) %>%
  setNames(., paste0(paths, "_scaled")) %>%
  do.call(cbind, .)


df[, colnames(scaled_paths)] <- scaled_paths

# df <- df %>%
# left_join(histo_df_wide[,c("sample_id", "histo_class")], suffix = c("", "_histo"))
```



```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 4}
# df$time_point_col <- factor(df$time_point,
#                             levels = levels(df$time_point),
#                             labels = glue("<b style='color:{db$colors$time_point[levels(df$time_point)]}'>{levels(df$time_point)}</b>"))
#
# df$time_point_col <- factor(df$time_point, levels = levels(df$time_point),
#                             labels = glue("<b style='color:{db$colors$time_point[levels(df$time_point)]}'>{levels(df$time_point)}</b>")

library(ggtern)

p1 <- df %>%
  mutate(acquired_mapk = secondary_mapk_binned == "MAPKalt") %>%
  ggtern(aes(y = LUAD_scaled, x = LUSC_scaled, z = SCLC_scaled)) +
  geom_mask() +
  geom_point(aes(fill = time_point, shape = acquired_mapk), size = 3, show.legend = T) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = db$colors$time_point) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 24)) +
  theme_classic() +
  Tlab("LUAD") + Llab("LUSC") + Rlab("SCLC") +
  theme_nolabels() +
  # theme_nomask() +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = 21)),
    shape = guide_legend(override.aes = list(fill = "black"))
  ) +
  labs(fill = "Timepoint", shape = "Acquired MAPK") +
  theme_noticks() +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(), panel.border = element_blank()) +
  # facet_grid(.~time_point, switch = "x") +
  theme(
    # axis.title = element_markdown(color = "blue"), # This is where to do it
    strip.background = element_part_rect(side = ""),
    legend.position = "right",
    strip.text.x.bottom = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold")
  )
ggsave(p1, file = here("plots", "sample_ternary_mapk.pdf"), width = 6, height = 3.4)
p1
```


Post treatment only showing mapk alts

```{r}
p2 <- df %>%
  filter(time_point == "Progression") %>%
  ggtern(aes(y = LUAD_scaled, x = LUSC_scaled, z = SCLC_scaled)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = secondary_mapk_binned, color = time_point), size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = db$colors$time_point) +
  theme_classic() +
  Tlab("LUAD") + Llab("LUSC") + Rlab("SCLC") +
  theme_nolabels() +
  theme_nomask() +
  labs(fill = "Timepoint") +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(), panel.border = element_blank()) +
  # facet_grid(.~time_point, switch = "x") +
  theme(
    # axis.title = element_markdown(color = "blue"), # This is where to do it
    strip.background = element_part_rect(side = ""),
    legend.position = "right",
    strip.text.x.bottom = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold")
  )
p2
```


```{r, fig.width = 12, fig.height = 8}
p2 <- ggtern(df, aes(y = LUAD_scaled, x = LUSC_scaled, z = SCLC_scaled)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_manual(values = tp_cols) +
  theme_classic() +
  Tlab("LUAD") + Llab("LUSC") + Rlab("SCLC") +
  theme_nolabels() +
  theme_nomask() +
  labs(color = "Tumor") +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(), panel.border = element_blank()) +
  facet_grid(. ~ time_point, switch = "x") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_part_rect(side = ""),
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text.x.bottom = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold")
  )

pcomb <- as.ggplot((arrangeGrob(p1, p2)))
pcomb
```


#### Per sample ternary

```{r}
paths <- c("LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC")

histo_per_cell_df <- scater::makePerCellDF(sce, features = paths, assay.type = "counts")

scaled_paths <- map(paths, \(p) {
  standardize(histo_per_cell_df[[p]])
}) %>%
  setNames(., paste0(paths, "_scaled")) %>%
  do.call(cbind, .)

histo_per_cell_df[, colnames(scaled_paths)] <- scaled_paths
```


```{r, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 10}
# GMM for each?
df <- histo_per_cell_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = ends_with("_scaled"), names_to = "type", values_to = "Score")

df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = type, y = Score)) +
  geom_violin(scale = "width") +
  facet_wrap(~sample_id)
```


```{r}
paths <- c("LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC")

histo_plots <- map(unique(srt_tum$sample_id), \(s) {
  p0 <- histo_per_cell_df %>%
    filter(sample_id == s) %>%
    pivot_longer(all_of(paths), names_to = "pathway", values_to = "score") %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = pathway, y = score, color = pathway)) +
    # geom_violin(color = "grey50", scale = "width") +
    geom_quasirandom(size = 0.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = db$colors$histo_cols) +
    theme_classic() +
    NoLegend() +
    labs(y = "Signature Score", x = "Signature") +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_blank(),
      panel.background = element_blank(),
      axis.line = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
      plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "cm")
    )

  p1 <- histo_per_cell_df %>%
    filter(sample_id == s) %>%
    ggtern(aes(y = LUAD_scaled + 0.001, x = LUSC_scaled + 0.001, z = SCLC_scaled + 0.001)) +
    # ggtern(aes(y = LUAD_scaled, x = LUSC_scaled, z = SCLC_scaled)) +

    geom_hex_tern(binwidth = 0.07, fun = function(x) log10(sum(x))) +
    # geom_point(pch = 1, size = 0.5, alpha = 0.25) +
    theme_classic() +
    Tlab(glue("<b style='color:{db$colors$histo_cols[['LUAD']]}'>LUAD</b>")) +
    Llab(glue("<b style='color:{db$colors$histo_cols[['LUSC']]}'>LUSC</b>")) +
    Rlab(glue("<b style='color:{db$colors$histo_cols[['SCLC']]}'>SCLC</b>")) + scale_fill_viridis_c(breaks = seq(0, 5, by = 1), labels = function(x) {
      10^x
    }) +
    theme_nolabels() +
    theme_noticks() +
    guides(fill = guide_colorbar(position = "bottom", keywidth = 4, keyheight = 0.5)) +
    theme(
      axis.title = element_markdown(), legend.position = "none", legend.background = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "cm")
    ) +
    labs(fill = "Cell counts")

  # progressed <- unique(df2[df2$sample_id == s, "progressed"])
  # mech_resistance <- unique(df2[df2$sample_id == s, "mech_resistance"])
  # mech_of_resistance_to_osimertinib <- unique(df2[df2$sample_id == s, "mech_of_resistance_to_osimertinib"])


  # p <- ggplotify::as.ggplot(grid.arrange(p1, p0, nrow = 1, widths = c(2, 1))) +
  #   plot_annotation(
  #     title = glue("Sample: {s}"), theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
  #   )
  #   subtitle = glue("Progressed: {progressed}\nResistance: {mech_resistance}\nResistance detailed: {mech_of_resistance_to_osimertinib}")
  # )
  return(p1)
})
names(histo_plots) <- unique(histo_per_cell_df$sample_id)


# pdf("plots/histo_transform_plots.pdf", onefile = T, width = 8, height = 5)
# histo_plots[sample_order2]
# dev.off()
```


Manually construct

```{r, fig.width = 12, fig.height = 7}
title_theme <- theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14))

p1 <- ggplotify::as.ggplot(grid.arrange(histo_plots$Hpre20)) + ggplotify::as.ggplot(grid.arrange(histo_plots$Hpre32)) + plot_layout(ncol = 1) + plot_annotation(title = "Representative pre-treatment samples", theme = title_theme)
p2 <- ggplotify::as.ggplot(grid.arrange(histo_plots$Hpost18)) + ggplotify::as.ggplot(grid.arrange(histo_plots$Hpost31)) + plot_layout(ncol = 1) + plot_annotation(title = "Histological transformation", theme = title_theme)

p3 <- ggplotify::as.ggplot(grid.arrange(histo_plots$Hpost14)) + ggplotify::as.ggplot(grid.arrange(histo_plots$Hpost25)) + plot_layout(ncol = 1) + plot_annotation(title = "Biphenotypic LUAD SCLC Mix", theme = title_theme)

pcomb <- (ggplotify::as.ggplot(p1) + ggplotify::as.ggplot(p2) + ggplotify::as.ggplot(p3)) + plot_layout(ncol = 3)
ggsave(pcomb, file = here("plots", "example_sample_terns.pdf"), width = 12, height = 7.2)
pcomb
```


```{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 3.3}
p <- ggplotify::as.ggplot(grid.arrange(p1, p0, nrow = 1, widths = c(2.5, 1))) # +
p
```



## Pull out 'genomically encoded'

Plot that has the secondary activating mutations in:
- EGFRamp, EGFRmuts, METamp, ERBB2, KRAS, 
- Scaled expression of those genes
- MAPK pathway activity scores
- Histological signature scores
- ???

Or simply take the histological classifications in progressed patients, and have tracks that display the EGFR secondary mutation status, MET amps, KRAS amps, and other genes

Or plot the density of different mutations in the ternary diagram -- need a binary alteration matrix for this and need to scale number of cells per mutant sample

-- NEED A FLAT TABLE with SAMPLE - GENE - MUTATION CATEGORY - MUTATION SPECIFIC - SOURCe
- Pull from impact and infercnv for samples missing impact




```{r}
dat <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(time_point == "Progression")
```



```{r}
mapk_genomic_df <- df_log2fc %>%
  tidyr::separate_rows(mut_wt, sep = "; ") %>%
  filter(p_adj.signif != "" | sample_plot %in% c("Hpost23", "Hpost27")) %>%
  mutate(
    sample_id = sample_plot,
    mutation = mut_wt,
    source = "IMPACT"
  ) %>%
  select(sample_id, Gene, mutation, source, log2fc, p_adj, p_adj.signif, RNA_expression)


inferCNV_amp_df <- filter(cnv_df_long, inferCNV_amp) %>%
  mutate(
    Gene = gsub("_cnv", "", Gene),
    mutation = "Amplification",
    source = "inferCNV"
  ) %>%
  select(sample_id, Gene, mutation, source)


# Merge
# # Missing
secondary_alterations <- full_join(mapk_genomic_df, inferCNV_amp_df, by = c("sample_id", "Gene", "mutation")) %>%
  left_join(db$metadata[, c("sample_id", "has_impact", "time_point")]) %>%
  mutate(source = case_when(
    is.na(source.x) ~ source.y,
    is.na(source.y) ~ source.x,
    .default = "IMPACT+inferCNV"
  )) %>%
  # Notify when we have something in inferCNV but not impact
  # Can possible check the segment values for these genes
  mutate(note = case_when(
    has_impact & source == "inferCNV" ~ "inferCNV Only",
    has_impact & source == "IMPACT+inferCNV" ~ "IMPACT+inferCNV",
    !has_impact ~ "No IMPACT"
  )) %>%
  select(!matches(c("source.x", "source.y")))
```






## Linear modeling


Do a model with MAPKalt vs not for the three histologies, then a model for each mutation's association with LUSC and SCLC

```{r}
library(lme4)
library(tidyr)
library(broom.mixed)

dat <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
  filter(time_point == "Progression") %>%
  group_by(sample_id, secondary_mapk_binned, time_point) %>%
  summarize(across(c(LUAD, LUSC, SCLC), mean)) %>%
  mutate(mapkalt = secondary_mapk_binned == "MAPKalt")

mods <- map(c("LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC"), .f = function(pth) {
  mod <- lm(glue("{pth} ~ mapkalt"), dat) %>%
    broom::tidy(conf.int = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(Signature = pth, .before = 1) %>%
    filter(term == "mapkaltTRUE")
}) %>%
  list_rbind()

mods <- mods %>%
  rstatix::add_significance(
    p.col = "p.value",
    cutpoints = c(0, 1e-04, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 1),
    symbols = c("p<0.0001", "p<0.001", "p<0.01", "p<0.05", "p<0.1", "ns")
  )
```


```{r, fig.width = 2, fig.height = 1.5}
p <- mods %>%
  ggplot(., aes(x = estimate, y = fct_reorder(Signature, estimate, mean))) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(x = estimate, xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high), fatten = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "11") +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8)
  ) +
  labs(y = "Gene Signature", x = "Coefficient", title = "Acquired MAPK") +
  geom_text(data = {
    filter(mods, p.value != "ns")
  }, aes(y = Signature, x = estimate, label = p.value.signif), nudge_y = 0.325, size = 2.25)
ggsave(p, file = here("plots", "acquired_mapk_lm.pdf"), width = 2, height = 1.5)
p
```


For each gene we want to compute the odds that having a given mutation will yield a cell with a given signature

```{r}
genes <- unique(secondary_alterations$Gene)

gene_res <- map(genes, .f = function(gene) {
  samps <- filter(secondary_alterations, Gene == gene, time_point == "Progression") %>%
    pull(sample_id) %>%
    unique()


  n_samps <- length(samps)
  dat <- srt_tum@meta.data %>%
    filter(time_point == "Progression") %>%
    group_by(sample_id, time_point) %>%
    summarize(across(c(LUAD, LUSC, SCLC), mean)) %>%
    mutate(genealt = sample_id %in% samps)


  mods <- map(c("LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC"), .f = function(pth) {
    mod <- lm(glue("{pth} ~ genealt"), dat) %>%
      broom::tidy(conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      mutate(Gene = gene, Signature = pth, n_samps, .before = 1) %>%
      filter(term == "genealtTRUE")
  }) %>%
    list_rbind()

  mods <- mods %>%
    rstatix::add_significance(
      p.col = "p.value",
      cutpoints = c(0, 1e-04, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 1),
      symbols = c("p<0.0001", "p<0.001", "p<0.01", "p<0.05", "p<0.1", "ns")
    )

  #
  # dat <- histo_per_cell_df %>%
  #   filter(time_point == "Progression") %>%
  #   mutate(mut_samp = sample_id %in% samps)

  # dat <- histo_class %>%
  #   left_join(db$metadata) %>%
  #   filter(time_point == "Progression") %>%
  #   mutate(mut_samp = ifelse(sample_id %in% samps, "mut_pos", "mut_neg"))

  # mods <- map(paths, .f = function(pth) {
  #   # dat$binarized <- dat[[pth]] > 0.05
  #   dat$binarized <- ifelse(dat[[pth]] %in% c("high", "mid"), "histo_pos", "histo_neg")
  #
  #   # mod <- glm(as.formula(glue("binarized ~ mut_samp + sample_id")), family = binomial, data = dat) %>%
  #
  #   mod <- glm(glue("binarized ~ mut_samp + sample_id"), family = binomial(link = "logit"), data = dat) %>%
  #     broom::tidy(conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  #     mutate(Gene = gene, Signature = pth, .before = 1) %>%
  #     filter(term == "mut_sampTRUE") %>%
  #     select(!matches("term"))
  # }) %>%
  #   list_rbind()
}) %>%
  list_rbind()
```

Plot results

```{r, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 4}
gene_res %>%
  arrange(Signature, estimate) %>%
  mutate(order = row_number()) %>%
  {
    ggplot(., aes(x = order)) +
      scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = .$order,
        labels = glue("{.$Gene} (n={.$n_samps})"), guide = guide_axis(angle = 90)
      ) +
      geom_pointrange(aes(y = estimate, ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), fatten = 0.4) +
      facet_grid(. ~ Signature, scales = "free", space = "free") +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
      theme(
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
        strip.background = element_blank()
      )
  }
```

Vet a couple genes

```{r}
```



Vet with the raw data

```{r}
sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(srt_tum[unique(gene_res$Gene), ])

sce_muts <- scuttle::aggregateAcrossCells(sce, ids = sce$sample_id, statistics = "mean")

df_vet <- scuttle::makePerCellDF(sce_muts, features = c(unique(gene_res$Gene)), assay.type = "counts", use.coldata = T, use.dimred = F)
df_vet[, c("LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC")] <- NULL

df_vet <- df_vet %>%
  left_join(df_path[, c("sample_id", "LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC")])
```


```{r, fig.width = 3.3, fig.height = 3}
# Correlation matrix of gene expression and signatures
cor_res <- Hmisc::rcorr(as.matrix(df_vet[, c(unique(gene_res$Gene), "LUAD", "LUSC", "SCLC")]), type = "spearman")

cor_res_df <- tidy(cor_res) %>%
  filter(column1 %in% paths, !column2 %in% paths) %>%
  # mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")) %>%
  rstatix::add_significance(
    p.col = "p.value",
    cutpoints = c(0, 1e-04, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 1),
    symbols = c("****", "***", "**", "*", "^", "ns")
  )

hc <- cor_res_df %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c("column1"), names_from = "column2", values_from = "estimate") %>%
  column_to_rownames("column1") %>%
  as.matrix() %>%
  t()
hc <- hclust(dist(hc))

p <- cor_res_df %>%
  ggplot(., aes(x = column1, y = column2)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = -log10(p.value), color = estimate)) +
  scale_color_gradient2(low = scales::muted("blue"), high = scales::muted("red")) +
  geom_text(data = filter(cor_res_df, p.value.signif != "ns"), aes(label = p.value.signif), nudge_y = -0.15, size = 3) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  scale_size(range = c(0.5, 4)) +
  labs(color = "Spearmans rho", x = "Signature", y = "Gene") +
  scale_x_discrete(guide = guide_axis(angle = 0)) +
  scale_y_dendrogram(hclust = hc) +
  theme(axis.ticks.length = unit(2, "pt")) +
  guides(
    color = guide_colorbar(keywidth = 0.5, keyheight = 3),
    size = guide_legend(keywidth = 0.5, keyheight = 0.75)
  )
ggsave(p, file = here("plots", "gene_sig_cor_dotplot.pdf"), width = 3.3, height = 3)
p

# corrplot::corrplot(corr = cor_res$r, p.mat = cor_res$Padj, sig.level = 0.05, type = "upper", order = "hclust", tl.col = "black", insig = "blank", col = colorRampPalette(c(scales::muted("blue"), "white", scales::muted("red")))(200))
```



## Try density tern (not working)

Not working bc zero values can't be encoded in a density plot

For each mutant gene plot ternary density across samples


```{r}
genes <- unique(secondary_alterations$Gene)

pls <- map(genes, .f = function(gene) {
  samps <- filter(secondary_alterations, Gene == gene, time_point == "Progression") %>%
    pull(sample_id) %>%
    unique()


  n_samps <- length(samps)

  dat <- histo_per_cell_df %>%
    filter(sample_id %in% samps) %>%
    add_count(sample_id, name = "samp_count") %>%
    mutate(weight = 1 / samp_count)

  # dat$LUAD_scaled[dat$LUAD_scaled == 0] <- 0.011
  # dat$LUSC_scaled[dat$LUSC_scaled == 0] <- 0.011
  # dat$SCLC_scaled[dat$SCLC_scaled == 0] <- 0.011

  # set.seed(3)

  p1 <- dat %>%
    ggtern(aes(y = LUAD_scaled, x = LUSC_scaled, z = SCLC_scaled)) +
    # geom_hex_tern(binwidth = 0.07, fun = function(x) log10(sum(x))) +
    # geom_density_tern() +
    stat_density_tern(
      geom = "polygon",
      aes(fill = after_stat(level)),
      # weight = dat$weight,
      color = "grey",
      linewidth = 0.2,
      bins = 10,
      show.legend = F
      # expand = c(1,1)
    ) +
    # stat_interpolate_tern() +
    # geom_point() +
    theme_gray() +
    Tlab(glue("<b style='color:{db$colors$histo_cols[['LUAD']]}'>LUAD</b>")) +
    Llab(glue("<b style='color:{db$colors$histo_cols[['LUSC']]}'>LUSC</b>")) +
    Rlab(glue("<b style='color:{db$colors$histo_cols[['SCLC']]}'>SCLC</b>")) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c() +
    theme_nolabels() +
    theme_noticks() +
    labs(fill = "Density", title = glue("{gene}\nn={n_samps}")) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), axis.title = element_markdown(), axis.ticks = element_blank())
  p1
})
names(pls) <- genes
```


Warning message:
stat_density_tern: You have not specified a below-detection-limit (bdl) value (Ref. 'bdl' and 'bdl.val' arguments in ?stat_density_tern). Presently you have 1x value/s below a detection limit of 0.010, which acounts for 0.010% of your data. Density values at fringes may appear abnormally high attributed to the mathematics of the ILR transformation. 
You can either:
1. Ignore this warning,
2. Set the bdl value appropriately so that fringe values are omitted from the ILR calculation, or
3. Accept the high density values if they exist, and manually set the 'breaks' argument 
   so that the countours at lower densities are represented appropriately. 

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
histo_plots <- map(unique(df2$sample_id), \(s) {
  p0 <- df2 %>%
    filter(sample_id == s) %>%
    pivot_longer(all_of(tums), names_to = "pathway", values_to = "score") %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = pathway, y = score, color = pathway)) +
    geom_quasirandom() +
    scale_color_nejm() +
    theme_classic() +
    NoLegend() +
    labs(y = "Pathway Score", x = "Tumor Pathway")

  p1 <- df2 %>%
    filter(sample_id == s) %>%
    ggtern(aes(y = LUAD_scaled, x = LUSC_scaled, z = SCLC_scaled)) +
    geom_hex_tern(binwidth = 0.07, fun = function(x) log10(sum(x))) +
    # geom_point(pch = 1, size = 0.5, alpha = 0.25) +
    theme_classic() +
    Tlab("LUAD") + Llab("LUSC") + Rlab("SCLC") +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(breaks = seq(0, 5, by = 1), labels = function(x) {
      10^x
    }) +
    theme_nolabels() +
    labs(fill = "Cell counts")

  progressed <- unique(df2[df2$sample_id == s, "progressed"])
  mech_resistance <- unique(df2[df2$sample_id == s, "mech_resistance"])
  mech_of_resistance_to_osimertinib <- unique(df2[df2$sample_id == s, "mech_of_resistance_to_osimertinib"])


  p <- as.ggplot(grid.arrange(p1, p0, nrow = 1, widths = c(2, 1))) +
    plot_annotation(
      title = glue("Sample: {s}"),
      subtitle = glue("Progressed: {progressed}\nResistance: {mech_resistance}\nResistance detailed: {mech_of_resistance_to_osimertinib}")
    )
  return(p)
})
names(histo_plots) <- unique(df2$sample_id)


pdf("plots/histo_transform_plots.pdf", onefile = T, width = 8, height = 5)
histo_plots[sample_order2]
dev.off()
```


Plot

```{r, fig.width=11.5, fig.height=5}
# histo_df_wide <- histo_frac_df %>%
#   pivot_wider(names_from = Histology, id_cols = sample_id, values_from = positive) %>%
#   left_join(histo_class)
#
histo_frac_df_long <- histo_frac_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(LUAD, LUSC, SCLC), names_to = "Histology", values_to = "positive")

sample_order3 <- histo_frac_df %>%
  arrange(histo_class, (LUAD), (LUSC), (SCLC)) %>%
  pull(sample_id)

p0 <- histo_frac_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(sample_id, sample_order3), y = "Histo-Class")) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = histo_class)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = db$colors$histo_cols) +
  facet_grid(. ~ time_point, scales = "free", space = "free") +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90)) +
  labs(y = NULL, x = "Sample", fill = "Histo-Class")

p01 <- histo_frac_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(sample_id, sample_order3), y = "Progressed")) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = progressed)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey", "black")) +
  facet_grid(. ~ time_point, scales = "free", space = "free") +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90), fill = guide_legend(keywidth = 0.5, keyheight = 0.1)) +
  labs(y = NULL, x = "Sample", fill = "Progressed")

p0b <- histo_frac_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = time_point)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill = fct_rev(histo_class)), position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = db$colors$histo_cols) +
  labs(y = "Proportion", fill = "Histo-Class", x = "Time Point") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = T))


p1 <- histo_frac_df_long %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(sample_id, sample_order3), y = fct_rev(Histology))) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = positive)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(direction = -1) +
  facet_grid(. ~ time_point, scales = "free", space = "free") +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90)) +
  labs(x = "Sample", y = "Histology", fill = "Histo-Positivity Score")

p2 <- histo_frac_df_long %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Histology)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill = fct_rev(positive)), position = "fill") +
  facet_grid(. ~ time_point) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(direction = 1) +
  labs(y = "Proportion", fill = "Histo-Score") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = T)) +
  theme(strip.clip = "off", strip.background = element_part_rect(side = "", fill = NA))

p0_fmt <- (p0 + theme(legend.position = "bottom", axis.line.y = element_blank(), strip.background.x = element_blank(), strip.text = element_blank()) + labs(x = NULL))


p01_fmt <- (p01 + coord_cartesian(clip = "off") + labs(x = NULL) + theme(axis.line = element_blank(), strip.text = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_text(), axis.ticks.y = element_line(), axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), legend.position = "left"))

p0comb <- p0_fmt

pA <- (p1 + labs(x = NULL) + theme(strip.background.x = element_part_rect(side = "b"), axis.line = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), legend.position = "top")) / p0comb + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 0.3))

pB <- (p2 + NoLegend() + guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 90))) / (p0b + NoLegend())

pcomb <- (pA | pB) + plot_layout(widths = c(1, 0.2))
ggsave(pcomb, file = here("plots", "histo_summary_plot.pdf"), width = 11, height = 5)

pcomb
```
